### caroline — 2021-08-27T11:53:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/its-on-australias-truckers-are-shutting-down-the-country-and-taking-it-back.26344/post-302967>

Thanks Sue - I was just about to look that up and read...

What is going on in the UK?

### Sue-UK — 2021-08-27T20:11:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/its-on-australias-truckers-are-shutting-down-the-country-and-taking-it-back.26344/post-302979>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=302967)
>
> Thanks Sue - I was just about to look that up and read...
>
> What is going on in the UK?

Not as bad as Aus, but we are still in our summer. Some people still wearing masks outside, and its roughly 50 per cent wearing them in supermarkets, but getting less as the days go by since it became voluntary in July. We've been out for a meal a few times, using restaurants that aren't forcing their staff to wear masks, even if the customers don't have to. But the hospitality trade has been hit hard. A lot of staff found other "essential worker" jobs during lockdown, such as food retail, with less unsocial hours, and there's now a staff shortage. Some places are shutting 2 days a week because they are short staffed. If vaccine passports come in I think a lot of them will be finished. The big issue at the moment is vaccinating 12-17 year olds via schools, possibly without parental consent. There's been rumblings for a while, after people started noticing adverts for jobs in schools for vaccine staff, but the rumour that it might not need parental consent has really lit the fuse. I've seen a few people on twitter say they won't send their kids into school if that becomes a reality, but there's some template letters now going around, for parents to let a school know they will be sued, quoting the relevant legal stuff and court rulings.

What drives me nuts is the vaccine tents that appear at shows and country fairs and other events. No appointment, no proof of identity or discussion about your health status .... Just wander in ..... Was at a country fair today and one was there, but didn't look like it was popular. Didn't stop a family member suggesting I just go for it, easy, no queues, in and out in a minute .... Managed to avoid a full blown argument about it, but for dividing people its like Brexit on steroids ....  Outside of the family no-one has asked yet, but vaccine passports will change that. But in France they are already in, and I've seen videos of French families taking picnics and wine and having them outside the restaurants and cafes that are being made to enforce vaccine passports, leaving the cafes and restaurants almost empty. Even if its not getting on MSM, I'm hoping our government is taking note .....

> [Sue-UK said:](/goto/post?id=302979)
>
> Not as bad as Aus, but we are still in our summer. Some people still wearing masks outside, and its roughly 50 per cent wearing them in supermarkets, but getting less as the days go by since it became voluntary in July. We've been out for a meal a few times, using restaurants that aren't forcing their staff to wear masks, even if the customers don't have to. But the hospitality trade has been hit hard. A lot of staff found other "essential worker" jobs during lockdown, such as food retail, with less unsocial hours, and there's now a staff shortage. Some places are shutting 2 days a week because they are short staffed. If vaccine passports come in I think a lot of them will be finished. The big issue at the moment is vaccinating 12-17 year olds via schools, possibly without parental consent. There's been rumblings for a while, after people started noticing adverts for jobs in schools for vaccine staff, but the rumour that it might not need parental consent has really lit the fuse. I've seen a few people on twitter say they won't send their kids into school if that becomes a reality, but there's some template letters now going around, for parents to let a school know they will be sued, quoting the relevant legal stuff and court rulings.
>
> What drives me nuts is the vaccine tents that appear at shows and country fairs and other events. No appointment, no proof of identity or discussion about your health status .... Just wander in ..... Was at a country fair today and one was there, but didn't look like it was popular. Didn't stop a family member suggesting I just go for it, easy, no queues, in and out in a minute .... Managed to avoid a full blown argument about it, but for dividing people its like Brexit on steroids ....  Outside of the family no-one has asked yet, but vaccine passports will change that. But in France they are already in, and I've seen videos of French families taking picnics and wine and having them outside the restaurants and cafes that are being made to enforce vaccine passports, leaving the cafes and restaurants almost empty. Even if its not getting on MSM, I'm hoping our government is taking note .....

things are getting a little tough around here too .....lots more calls to see if we have changed our minds about getting the vax.

They say they respect our opinion ...all the while being convinced that we are being hosed and led down the garden path of unvaccinationdom. They keep asking "what the heck are you guys reading anyway????" Getting the jab is a no brainer.

I am turning into an angry person ....and I don't want to do that.

We are supposed to be having a video call tonite ....can I just say UGH.

They said they haven't seen us for so long ......so I guess they want to turn the screws face to face.

I got to be an angry person last year, after having a taste of what being in the wrong tier of a two tier society would be like. I finished up moving away from family (that included my grandchildren) to save my sanity. Minor angry blip at the country fair when I went back to visit, which wouldn't have happened had the vaccine tent not been there, but in general I've decided to go a different route ....

Eyes tend to roll when I talk about the science behind face nappies, so when the conversation about face masks came up whilst I was in the hairdressers this week, I just announced loudly that there was no point putting myself at risk by wearing a petrie dish when as viruses were smaller than scent molecules , if you could smell a fart whilst wearing one it obviously wasn't working. .....

People outside of the family tend to assume that I'm vaccinated because of my age. When we moved I was told by a neighbour that everyone on the complex had been vaccinated, but I didn't offer up any information about us. Anybody who does directly ask risks being questioned about when they last had a smear, or a prostate exam ....

People have been peacefully demonstrating and nothing much changes, and the media is largely ignoring it, or making people out to be conspiracy theorists. Even if they were to admit it was 120,000 at a demo, when the country's population is nearly 70 million, it doesn't have the same impact. Even film on social media of police being heavy handed or even downright brutal at demos hasn't changed the narrative, a few thousand retweets is a drop in the ocean to wake people up.

A lot of the activists are preaching to the choir. Direct action that leads to outcomes that can't be ignored by the media or governments (like food shortages affecting millions) are a different ballgame. Its a catalyst. In the UK it is likely to be if the vaccination and immunization board's decision to not recommend vaccination of 12 to 15 year olds is ignored, (particularly if parental consent won't be necessary) that is likely to be a wake up catalyst.

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-09-07T13:41:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/its-on-australias-truckers-are-shutting-down-the-country-and-taking-it-back.26344/post-303435>

I too stocked up at the start of talk of shortages, freezer full of meat & fish, no issues accessing fresh fruit & veg, only non perishable type items we use like salt, oil, coconut oil, MCT oil, long life coconut milk, coconut cream, bottled water - still and sparkling, seed crackers etc so we are fine for months ahead.

I also purchased two lovely planter boxes on wheels (easy to move) and looking for online source of organic seedlings to plant up leafy greens, herbs and some veggies.

I have just purchased beautiful organic dried herbs from an organic seller in Maleny. I bought tons of antiviral herbs, liver herbs, spices to have on hand as well as elderberry syrup, honey, propalis, bee pollen amongst other things should we or anyone in the family need them.

I cant speak to mainstream supermarkets as I don't go there, but saw pics of empty shelves, couldnt have been happier. All of last year I had no problems with any shortages either as I shop with small local organic growers - even farmers markets, befriend farmers and buy direct from them supporting the little guy and knocking out the middle man.

Yay for the truckies!!!

I have a favourite little shop in our town. I adore the woman that owns it.

I can't go into shops now so we decided that I would just stand outside and hand her my credit card.

If I go into her shop She would be libel for a $5000.00 fine and I would get a $1000.00 fine.

We kind of figured who is actually going to enforce that? The police? not likely - we don't even have a detachment of police here so probably no reason to worry too much........

This morning she told me that a small shop across the street was fined $5000.00 and the customer $1000.00.

So I asked her if it was the police and Meghan said no ......it seems to be regular people sort of situated throughout this little town and acting as spies/informants.

So much for Aussie traditional values .......STAND BY YOUR MATE being a biggie.

### Dan2 — 2021-08-25T08:11:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-fake-news-that-fda-approved-the-vaccines-is-made-clear-in-the-letter.26349/post-302889>

( [@John Schumacher](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23768/) )

edit: After reading what Meryl Nass and others have said, what Robert Malone said in the second paragraph of this, that I now emphasized, seems, compared to Meryl Nass, RFK Jr., and Ron Johnson, to be misleading. BioNTech isn't licensed; it's EUA. And I don't know why Malone said "it" (referring to BioNTech, I'm assuming) is called COMIRNATY.

[https://raypeatforum.com/community/...n-monday-august-23rd.42096/page-3#post-688171](https://raypeatforum.com/community/threads/breaking-fda-is-pushing-to-fully-approve-pfizer-covid19-vaccine-on-monday-august-23rd.42096/page-3#post-688171)

In that post is a Twitter video posted by TanyaRo58329998, an excerpt of an interview with Dr. Robert Malone by Steve Bannon.

Steve Bannon:
"When you look at these two letters \[FDA letters attached to this post? not sure which he's referring to\], the way you've broken them apart -- and I want to go back to what you've said about the data; there's really no data -- \[the FDA\] has authorized the use of a vaccine. Does that vaccine currently exist? If I go to a doctor today, can I get this one that has this sketchy shady FDA approval? Is that available right now to the best of your knowledge, sir?"

Robert Malone:
"It's absolutely not available. The little trick that they've done here is that they've issued two separate letters for two separate vaccines. The Pfizer vaccine, which is what is currently available, is still under emergency use authorization, and it still has the liability shield. Once again, the mainstream media has lied to you -- I'm sorry to say that, I know it's a shock. But **the product that's licensed is the BioNTech product**, which is substantially similar but not necessarily identical. **It's called COMIRNATY**... and it's not yet available; they haven't started manufacturing it or labeling it. And that's the one that liability waiver will no longer apply to. So the one that's actually licensed is not yet available, and when it does become available it will no longer have the liability shield. In the interim, the one that does have the liability shield is the Pfizer product, and that's what's currently available and it's still under emergency use authorization, so that's no change. The press has just not done their work and figured out what's actually going on here."

Steve Bannon:
"The Emergency Use Authorization by the FDA for the Pfizer product, as it currently stands, does not allow its use for children under 16. Is that correct?"

Robert Malone:
"Correct."

### Dan2 — 2021-08-25T09:17:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-fake-news-that-fda-approved-the-vaccines-is-made-clear-in-the-letter.26349/post-302890>

Blog posts by Meryl Nass MD
(I think these are a better explanation than my previous post.)

[https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/i-explain-my-theory-of-comirnaty.html](https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/i-explain-my-theory-of-comirnaty.html)

August 23, 2021

I explain my theory of the COMIRNATY "license" scam by referring to passages in the FDA approval letter

\[full post copied\]
"Read the [FDA approval letter](https://www.fda.gov/media/150386/download) please \[[https://www.fda.gov/media/150386/download](https://www.fda.gov/media/150386/download)\]. This is how they scam you, by making it nearly impenetrable. Below, I identify the two most relevant passages. The rest of the letter is repetitive blather to keep your head spinning.

page 2 last line, footnote: here FDA quietly admits that the licened Pfizer vaccine and the authorized Pfizer vaccine are identical w.r.t. safety and efficacy, but they are "legally distinct." That's **code** for one has manufacturer liability, while the other doesn't. It is also **code** for "we don't want to impose a mandate on the EUA product 'cause it is illegal, but we can probably get away with a mandate on the licensed product."

page 12 AA. This tells you that yes, we licensed the vaccine, but...there is a lot of the old vaccine out there, actually "a significant amount" and this amount will be considered an EUA vaccine and will continue to be used. Maybe for a very long time.

Now, why would they do that? Why specify that identical versions of the product will be legally different? Because they need the license to impose the mandates. But they need the EUA to evade liability.

Along with the **license** comes liability for the manufacturer. (But all **EUA** products were given a liability shield.)

Unfortunately, our federal overlords would prefer us to be without recourse if we are injured, rather than have Pfizer risk defending its product in court.

So, my inference is that the feds want the public to THINK the vaccine they are receiving is **licensed,** which will make people submit because they believe it can now be mandated, but instead the public is almost certain to receive the **EUA** vials instead, to save Pfizer's behind.

\* You will be able to tell the difference when you see the vaccine vial. The letter explains that the **COMIRNATY**\-labelled vials will be the **licensed** ones, and the others (under **EUA**) will say something like **Pfizer BioNTech Covid-19 Vaccine** _without_ the brand name **COMIRNATY.**

Yes, a stingy CICP injury program exists, which I have previously written about, but it has not paid out for a single Covid vaccine injury, last time I checked.

How did I figure this out? Because I have read other FDA approval letters, and this one had significant weasel wording. And I have seen other FDA tricks. So it just took me awhile to identify what was being hidden. I could be wrong. But then we would need another explanation for the language in the approval letter. I'm happy to entertain other interpretations.

P.S. Pfizer made $33 billion so far this year on its mRNA vaccine."

\_\_\_\_\_

[https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/fda-covid-vaccine-approval-dr-robert.html](https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/fda-covid-vaccine-approval-dr-robert.html)

August 24, 2021

FDA Covid Vaccine "Approval"--Dr. Robert Malone has compiled a laundry list of concerns from multiple sources regarding the validity of the so-called approval

\[longer article; I'm excerpting some things I didn't expect after reading the first article\]

"...The prescribing info says: "There is a pregnancy exposure registry for COMIRNATY. Encourage individuals exposed to COMIRNATY around the time of conception or during pregnancy to register by visiting [https://mothertobaby.org/ongoingstudy/covid19-vaccines/](https://mothertobaby.org/ongoingstudy/covid19-vaccines/) ." **WHY ARE THEY DOING A PREGNANCY STUDY?**..."

\[emphasis in next paragraph mine\]
"The BLA \[biologics license approval\] acknowledges LONG term myocardial issues with a 5 year follow up consistent with the lower range for Long term follow-up (LTFU) for Gene Therapy Products. Is FDA tacitly acknowledging the Gene Therapy classification? **These products \[COMIRNATY?\] have been classified by FDA and by their manufacturers in SEC filings as Gene Therapy Products, which require up to 15 years long term follow up in studies**. **This was acknowledged by Moderna in their 2Q 2020 filing.** Will FDA collect other long term data on autoimmune disease, cancer and other disorders as contemplated in their Gene Therapy Guidance document? "

"Regarding the Pediatric Indication Requirements applied to the BioNTech license, Postmarketing requirements include multiple “deferred” studies

o Deferred pediatric Study C4591001 to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of COMIRNATY in children 12 years through 15 years of age.

o Deferred pediatric Study C4591007 to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of COMIRNATY in infants and children 6 months to <12 years of age.

o Deferred pediatric Study C4591023 to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of COMIRNATY in infants <6 months of age."

\_\_\_\_\_

[https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/the-fdas-approval-of-pfizers-comirnaty.html](https://anthraxvaccine.blogspot.com/2021/08/the-fdas-approval-of-pfizers-comirnaty.html)

August 24, 2021

The FDA's "approval" of Pfizer's Comirnaty vaccine is a Bait and Switch that makes mandates illegal

written with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

[https://childrenshealthdefense.org/defender/mainstream-media-fda-approval-pfizer-vaccine/](https://childrenshealthdefense.org/defender/mainstream-media-fda-approval-pfizer-vaccine/)

\[emphasis mine\]
"**At least for the moment, the Pfizer Comirnaty vaccine has no liability shield**. Vials of the branded product, which say “Comirnaty” on the label, are subject to the same product liability laws as other U.S. products.

When the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention’s (CDC) Advisory Committee for Immunization Practices places a vaccine on the mandatory schedule, a childhood vaccine benefits from an generous retinue of liability protections.

But licensed adult vaccines, including the new Comirnaty, do not enjoy any liability shield. Just as with Ford’s exploding Pinto, or Monsanto’s herbicide Roundup, **people injured by the Comirnaty vaccine could potentially sue for damages**.

And because adults injured by the vaccine will be able to show that the manufacturer knew of the problems with the product, jury awards could be astronomical.

**Pfizer is therefore unlikely to allow any American to take a Comirnaty vaccine until it can somehow arrange immunity for this product**.

Given this background, **the FDA’s acknowledgement in its approval letter that there are insufficient stocks of the licensed Comirnaty, but an abundant supply of the EUA Pfizer BioNTech jab, exposes the “approval” as a cynical scheme to encourage businesses and schools to impose illegal jab mandates**.

**The FDA’s clear motivation is to enable Pfizer to quickly unload inventories of a vaccine that science and the Vaccine Adverse Events Reporting System have exposed as unreasonably dangerous, and that the Delta variant has rendered obsolete**.

**Americans, told that the Pfizer COVID vaccine is now licensed, will understandably assume that COVID vaccine mandates are lawful. But only EUA-authorized vaccines, for which no one has any real liability, will be available during the next few weeks when many school mandate deadlines occur.**

The FDA appears to be purposefully tricking American citizens into giving up their right to refuse an experimental product.

**While the media has trumpeted that the FDA has approved COVID vaccines, the FDA has not approved the Pfizer BioNTech vaccines, nor any COVID vaccines for the 12- to 15-year age group, nor any booster doses for anyone**.

**And FDA has not licensed any Moderna vaccine, nor any vaccine from Johnson & Johnson** — so the vast majority of vaccines available in the US, if not all, remain unlicensed EUA products.

Here’s what you need to know **when somebody orders you to get the vaccine: Ask to see the vial. If it says “Comirnaty,” it’s a licensed product. If it says “Pfizer-BioNTech,” it’s an experimental product, and under 21 U.S. Code 360bbb, you have the right to refuse**.

**If it comes from Moderna or Johnson & Johnson (marketed as Janssen), you have the right to refuse**.
"

Thursday, August 26, 2021

BIG NEWS!!! You cannot be forced to get the Covid vaccine. Here is the way out.
By Meryl Nass MD

\[emphasis by Meryl Nass\]

Let me show you how FDA, Pfizer and BioNTech colluded to fool everyone about the EUA status of the vaccine Americans will be offered. But close reading of their document gives you an escape route. The "Fact Sheet for Recipients", \[[https://www.fda.gov/media/144414/download](https://www.fda.gov/media/144414/download)\] dated August 23, 2021, is approved by FDA and is on FDA's website, and is signed by BioNTech and Pfizer.

Direct quotes from this easy to read 8 page document \[[https://www.fda.gov/media/144414/download](https://www.fda.gov/media/144414/download)\] are below, and I suggest you print the document out, as it will help you avoid a vaccine mandate. Pay close attention. I added numbers to the most interesting excerpts.

After stating that you might receive the licensed vaccine or a vaccine under EUA in item 2, item 6 indicates that both the licensed vaccine AND the EUA vaccine are both under EUA. (This may be the way chosen to shield the licensed vaccine from liability.) Item 5 says that while under EUA, it is your choice whether or not to receive the vaccine.

Show this document to your college, your hospital, your boss. They cannot force you to receive either of these vaccines!

\-----------------

**1\. The FDA-approved COMIRNATY (COVID-19 Vaccine, mRNA) and the FDA-authorized Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 Vaccine under Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) have the same formulation and can be used interchangeably to provide the COVID-19 vaccination series.\[1\]**

2\. You are being offered either COMIRNATY (COVID-19 Vaccine, mRNA) or the Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 Vaccine to prevent Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) caused by SARS-CoV-2.

3\. The licensed vaccine has the same formulation as the EUA-authorized vaccine and the products can be used interchangeably to provide the vaccination series without presenting any safety or effectiveness concerns. The products are **legally distinct** with **certain differences** that do not impact safety or effectiveness.

4\. **WHAT IF I DECIDE NOT TO GET COMIRNATY (COVID-19 VACCINE, mRNA) OR THE PFIZER-BIONTECH COVID-19 VACCINE?**

5\. **Under the EUA, it is your choice to receive or not receive the vaccine. Should you decide not to receive it**, it will not change your standard medical care.

6\. This EUA for the Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 Vaccine **and** COMIRNATY will end when the Secretary of HHS determines that the circumstances justifying the EUA no longer exist or when there is a change in the approval status of the product such that an EUA is no longer needed.

Manufactured by Pfizer Inc., New York, NY 10017

### Shanti — 2021-08-28T05:15:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shantis-optimal-journal.26361/post-303006>

WHOA! Dude! Jack is brilliant! I hope one day I will have as many neurons firing in my head as he does! (and I will understand everything he is writing about!)...I hope my heart and brain's mitochondria also redoxes radiating out far and wide AND I get big fat muscles. But I had an epiphany last month and understand what he says about upgrading our biochemistry beyond what is currently known in the western medical paradigm and moving towards optimal with enthusiasm! I have been sleeping outside since April this year and I think it is upgrading my level of health while I sleep. So I am ditching the dogma, breaking out of the moulds, poofing the paradigms and excited about activating my ancient DNA pathways for optimal being on this planet!

This past month, I jumped in with both feet to Jack's protocols. I increased my cold therapy to at least twice a day, morning and evening, and sometimes even more, with multiple plunges for 5 minutes or a 20 minute swim in the cool ocean. It feels amazing!!! I love it. Does this mean I am cold adapted?

Even though I have had a past of histamine sensitivities and migraines and have been on daily medication (Zytec) for the past 4 years, I dropped the medication _and_ started eating oysters and crustaceans because I am betting that my biochemistry is different and I can take out the histamines with the cold. Yes? (and I made the change over without a hiccup! Thank you Jack!)

I have been going down to the beach to watch the sunrise for the past 2 years, but I have been wrapped up in sun protective gear. This month I am taking off my clothes and building solar callus. I am of Scandanavian decent with a dad who had several melanomas, but I am thinking that is because of his warm adapted biochemistry. The sun is going to optimize my health and the increased circulation from the cold, along with my diet without carbs, along with a positive attitude is a natural defense, yes? But what about the ozone layer? Should I minimize my sun exposure to 20 minutes?

I spend 4 hours a day on the computer. Although I am hardwired, I am indoors (suggestions?) behind glass. So I started wearing bl glasses, EMF gloves and a turtleneck. What else can I do? My house's windows are all UV protection for Califormia's Title 24 requirement. Do I change out the windows? ($$$ aye!) Would that matter?

Food: I have had mercury poisoning in the past from too much tuna. Although I am not eating tuna or fish that typically have more heavy metals, I wonder if I am eating too much seafood, as most days it is 1.5 lbs/day (plus a little offal or eggs). I also usually indulge in pistachios, low sugar coconut ice cream, cacao, or peanut butter at the end of the day (but always before 5pm) if I STILL feel hungry. (I have a big appetite, and I do eat some veggies every day too.) I have been doing less exercise. I thought that by doing more cold my appetite would drop, but it has stayed the same. Why? (Note: interesting: I have needed half the water I usually drink and feeling nicely hydrated. Also, the only protcol I usually don't follow is eating within 1/2 hour of rising. After sunrise I return to the house in the morning at 9 am,and so I eat breakfast then, but I have been feeding on light (in meditation, etc) and I don't think I am leptin resistant.)

Feeling part dolphin, Shanti

Hi Caroline - thank you for responding. I am eating 2t of Yak ghee, duck fat, or pastured butter only with my cooked veggies and eggs/offal. The rest of the time, when I eat oysters, scallops, salmon and other seafood, it is usually raw, and I don't use extra fat. (I was eating coconut oil, avo or olive oil over the summer but with the season changing that is coming to a halt)

( I haven't started with MCT/coconut oil because coconuts don't grow here (olives and avos do)...do you still suggest coconut oil till the fall equinox?

Yes, I can set up an office outside.

Yes, I read Jack's book twice. I get the part about the high quality seafood and protein, and I am doing that. Perhaps I don't have that fat quantity right? The peanut butter (or more usually the pistachios and coconut ice cream) comes out when I am over 24 ounces in seafood/offal protein/eggs, lots of seaweed, 2 avocados and I still feel hungry. In truth, the peanut butter has only been indulged in 4 times the past 2 weeks, but I haven't eaten any for the previous 16 years...so I am trying to understand what my body might be telling me. I must be missing something. What would you suggest instead? more seafood?

I don't think I found Jack's thoughts on living in CA other than the dryness. I am by the ocean with a fairly constant marine layer and my backyard is a small water cycle regen garden. Even with intense wind/fire storms around Malibu, they don't touch our neighborhood in here in Point Dume because this east wind has to travel over the Pacific Ocean to reach our home, and on its way, collects some steam.

Or was it on the bight sky polution? I cover my eyes when I sleep. I think I might still be missing what you are referring me to. ???

Thank you for sharing your thoughts! Shanti

Bitcoin is volatile, besides it works on the idea of HODL, which is a newer sell.
The way I figured on how to make this idea to work for me,
is:
for your daily expenses, keep 5 - 7 years' worth of cash at hand
in the above include all income (work, business) that you are rather sure that it will last 7 years.
I am not getting any paychecks since June 1997, so it is simpler for me.
Whatever is left over is put half in the Bitcoin, the other half in what you liked before you got hook on Bitcoin.

Good possibility that it is about gastric acid. Do you have a GERD?
GERD--->>Gastroesophageal reflux disease, is a chronic condition in which stomach contents rise up into the esophagus, resulting in either symptoms or complications. Symptoms include the taste of acid in the back of the mouth, heartburn, bad breath, chest pain, regurgitation, breathing problems, and wearing away of the teeth.

After over 50years of fighting my (supposedly) low stomach acid.
Sleeping on an inclined bed, and overall being greatly inconvenienced, add muscle cramps for decades,
I have found
that it is about low potassium and possibly other micronutrients.

Note, over that 50 years I was seeing medical doctors many times.
They ordered tests that checked my potassium (coincidentally).
ALWAYS WRONG TESTS. **100% of times.**
Does that sounds like I am little sore? Yes, more than a little.

### Shanti — 2021-09-21T02:59:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/shantis-optimal-journal.26361/post-304017>

The past 4 years I have been working with a Personal Medical Nutritionist Chrissie Williamson (DCN, CNS, MS) who, like everyone else except Jack, looks at vitals from a warm-adapted biochemistry perspective and has me on a long list of vitamins with an antihistamine. We made great strides, and after several decades of intense migraines, histamine and oxalate sensitivity, leaky gut and brain fog/memory issues resulting in severely dry skin, myopia and tinnitus. I have been totally free from them this past year, except for the tinnitus. I have been studying Jack work for the past 9 months, retiring at sunset, sleeping outside, greeting the sunrise and cold plunging for the past 2 years, and following a diet closely resembling Jack's Paleo RX without the crustaceans. Last month I realized my biochemistry can thrive without the daily Zyrtec, 6 magnesium threonate, 2-1t Magnesium Citrate, biotin, copper, manganese, zinc carnitine, glutathione, Vit E, DHA, and hyaluronic acid. I am titrating down slowing the Ultra Benfotiamine, riboflavin-5-phosphate, goat milk colostrum, amino acid complete, glycine, acetyl carnitine (3/day), True Niagen 500 (2/day). I take an orthobiotic 100 probiotic. I am thinking about titrating down the 3 Hcl/meal and the 2 LypoGold fat digestion enzymes, but I am told I am not a good fat digester with low enzymes. I am taking these last two items slow because I eat a lot, at least 18 ou and sometimes 24 or 30 ou of protein (a combo of oysters, scallops, other crustaceans, salmon, halibut, and offal, with 1T fat and an avocado or two from the garden and lots of sea veggies). I have a strong appetite.

So now I am ready to take my biochemistry to leap the quantum level. I will do a blood test in a few months, and hopefully it will be a testament to Jack's diet, protocols and wisdom!

### Jack Kruse — 2021-08-28T16:41:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-effect-of-cooling-your-csf-from-blood-plasma.26362/post-303018>

The brain is like the rest of your body; if you don’t use it, it gets de-conditioned with too little stimulation. It also can be tired out by too much stress or activity from modern life. It needs different "kinds of stimulation or exercise" to increase its varied function and requires both rest and recovery time to consolidate its gains.

To optimize brain function you need to limit inflammation by lowering the deuterium content of water in your mitochondria and in CSF. This implies you must become a water muse, first and foremost. The autonomic nervous system (ANS) regulation is a function of light and water properly activating one another to control magnetic flux in the spinning ATPase on the 5th cytochrome. Water chemistry is key in getting dissimilar bodies of water in the blood and CSF to transform energy properly. The vagus nerve connects dissimilar "bodies of water" within the human body to make them work coherently to optimize physiologic function. They use the light in that environment to make a connection or allow a mitochondrial disconnection which disrupts energy flows.
Cells are designed to be a repository of collectible wisdom from nature’s energy and information. That energy and data come to cells as and their energy and data are stored in water. Given our cellular design to capture and collected and decipher waves, no human being itself should be considered impaired innately, there are environmental that cause the impairment. Thus, it is incumbent on the clinician to recommend treatment of the environment their patient is in. People react to an inferior environment, way before their genome is altered. That is what the science of epigenetics and ubiquitin biology are telegraphing us, but the modern paradigm is not listening to this data. You must.

> [Optimal Performance: 194 The Deuterium Podcast - Cancer Prevention Hack with Dr. T. Que Collins (libsyn.com)](https://optimalperformancepodcast.libsyn.com/194-the-deuterium-podcast-cancer-prevention-hack-with-dr-t-que-collins?fbclid=IwAR23bJP3KIUatWutu_rcN-Tn-1R-3S4tuzw4rxZSPFgwndQc60LcFNOhssE)
> **Jan 28, 2019**
>
> LIGHT CANNOT CURE YOU
>
> But when deuterium levels are low, light is the way to go
>
> **All stuff, nnEMF etc is true**
>
> **But until you deplete deuterium nothing works** (time 1:09:01)
>
> \----

If the deuterium isotope of our most fundamental element may have been become more abundant, do we have an idea as to why.

We have classified three isotopes of hydrogen; from "healthy" to bad to dangerous: "hydrogen", deuterium & tritium, (which is capable of alpha, beta and gamma radiation). Do we understand how hydrogen's neuron/photon pair can obtain an additional "set" to become a deuterium? Or how a third pair is capable of continuously emission of high/powerful waveform light?

Deuterium made food maybe our biggest ban for the buck. DDW (25ppm) has show improvements for some; but have we grown food (plants in an DDW environment) under strong IR light?

Hydrogen is our fundamental element for human photosynthesis. [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4125832/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4125832/)

The higher energetic form from hydrogen to deuterium creates a powerful "magnetic effect", capable of pulling electron charge from surrounding molecules and having the capacity to transmute these molecules into harmful species (ex: NH4 oxide). [https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/304499](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/304499)

As we know from most human experiments, we have tried in pursuit of improving our health,

-   by mitigating what is thought to be "bad" things (this is our start),

-   then raise our redox quotient so we have the ATP mitochondrial energy to remove toxins,

-   then finding vibrant stimuli: good food sources, strong IR morning & strong UV noon sunlight,

-   grounding ourselves to the electric grid of our earth, etc.

Is health a supplementation of multiple interventions or is it wrapped in our human environment? [https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...is-it-wrapped-in-our-human-environment.25380/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/is-health-a-supplementation-of-multiple-interventions-or-is-it-wrapped-in-our-human-environment.25380/)

I would like to see more than just DDW supplementation "studies"; but the cultivation of deuterium depleted food sources as well.

### JanSz — 2021-08-28T23:01:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/critically-thinking-with-doc-p-and-t-aug-19-eggsellent-info-at-minute-35.26366/post-303037>

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33278625/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33278625/)

doi: 10.1016/j.ijid.2020.11.191. Epub 2020 Dec 2.
**A five-day course of ivermectin for the treatment of COVID-19 may reduce the duration of illness**

Ivermectin, a US Food and Drug Administration-approved anti-parasitic agent, was found to inhibit severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) replication in vitro.
A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial was conducted to determine the rapidity of viral clearance and safety of ivermectin among adult SARS-CoV-2 patients.
The trial included 72 hospitalized patients in Dhaka, Bangladesh, who were assigned to one of three groups:
**oral ivermectin alone (12 mg once daily for 5 days),**
oral ivermectin in combination with doxycycline (12 mg ivermectin single dose and 200 mg doxycycline on day 1, followed by 100 mg every 12 h for the next 4 days),
and a placebo control group.

Clinical symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat were comparable among the three groups. Virological clearance was earlier in the 5-day ivermectin treatment arm when compared to the placebo group (9.7 days vs 12.7 days; p = 0.02), but this was not the case for the ivermectin + doxycycline arm (11.5 days; p = 0.27). There were no severe adverse drug events recorded in the study.

**A 5-day course of ivermectin was found to be safe and effective in treating adult patients with mild COVID-19.**
Larger trials will be needed to confirm these preliminary findings.

### JanSz — 2021-08-28T23:12:44+0300

[https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/](https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/)

**Hydroxychloroquine was given as 800 mg once,**
**followed by 600 mg in 6 to 8 hours,**
**then 600 mg daily for 4 additional days**.
Patients started treatment within 4 days after exposure, defined as being in close contact with a COVID-19 patient for more than 10 minutes without protection.

### Dan2 — 2021-08-29T05:21:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/critically-thinking-with-doc-p-and-t-aug-19-eggsellent-info-at-minute-35.26366/post-303048>

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/)

"12mg Ivermectin
I am interested in the dosage of Ivermectin pills
.......
While at it dosage of hydroxychloroquine 200mg

While at it dosage of quinine sulfate 200mg"

I think the 200 mg HCQ dosage recommendation is from Vladimir Zelenko's protocols:

[https://vladimirzelenkomd.com/prophylaxis-protocol/](https://vladimirzelenkomd.com/prophylaxis-protocol/)

For prophylaxis:
"...Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) 200 mg 1 time a day for 5 days, then 1 time a week..."

[https://vladimirzelenkomd.com/treatment-protocol/](https://vladimirzelenkomd.com/treatment-protocol/)

For immediate treatment of SARS-CoV-2 infection:
"...Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) 200 mg 2 times a day for 5-7 days and/or
**Ivermectin 0.4-0.5 mg/kg/day for 5-7 days.**
Either or both HCQ and IVM can be used, and if one only, the second agent may be added after about 2 days of treatment if obvious recovery has not yet been observed etc...."

So there's Zelenko's immediate treatment recommendations about dosages of both IVM and HCQ.

And with the prophylaxis HCQ dosages, I calculated (using an approximate half-life duration of HCQ in the blood) how much HCQ is being maintained in the blood from (quoting Zelenko's prophylaxis protocol) "200 mg 1 time a day for 5 days, then 1 time a week".

2nd link here:

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...sy-article-on-prions.25857/page-2#post-301291](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/another-relatively-easy-article-on-prions.25857/page-2#post-301291)

(links to this: )

[https://raypeatforum.com/community/...-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303](https://raypeatforum.com/community/threads/transmissible-viral-vaccines-how-the-shots-are-affecting-those-who-havent-taken-it-they-may-be-designed-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303)

The Zelenko prophylaxis protocol will keep about 900-1100 mg of HCQ in the blood day to day when you're on the weekly doses (if I'm not misunderstanding the pharmacokinetics).

And also in that post I estimated how much quinine is maintained in the blood from 500 mg every 12 hours (using 12 hours because that's an estimate of quinine's half-life, and makes the calculations easy). So using 200 mg every 12 hours instead of 500 (because you said quinine sulfate 200 mg), that'd be (amount of quinine maintained in the blood considering quinine half-life):
Day 2: 350 mg
Day 3: 387.5 mg
Day 4: 396.865 mg
and then it stays at about that.

So because of quinine's shorter half-life compared to HCQ (HCQ about 22 days, quinine about 10-18 hours), if you're using quinine sulfate instead of HCQ and you want to maintain about the same amount of quinine in the blood as is maintained by Zelenko's HCQ prophylaxis protocol, you'd want to dose about 500 mg every 12 hours instead of 200 mg.

I don't see a recommendation from Zelenko about IVM dosage for prophylaxis, but if you want to mix the immediate treatment and prophylaxis protocol recommendations, then from the immediate treatment protocol: "Ivermectin 0.4-0.5 mg/kg/day for 5-7 days"

And so for a 200 lb person...
200 lbs = 90 kg
90 kg x 0.45 mg = 40.5 mg IVM per day for 5-7 days

And then what's IVM half-life, pharmacokinetics...

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2751445/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2751445/)

"Absorption
In healthy subjects that received **12 mg of ivermectin as oral solution, tablets or capsules, it was shown that the solution had approximately twice the systemic availability as either of the solid forms (tablets and capsules showed similar systemic availability**; Table 1). The oral solution was given as an ethanolic solution. This may affect bioavailability and could explain why the solution resulted in a twice as high availability as tablets and capsules. Nevertheless, **the rate of absorption was similar in the three cases** (11).

...

**Data concerning excretion can be observed on Table 1**. No differences in the elimination half-life were detected among healthy and onchocerciasis subjects (12). It was also suggested that the **kinetics of ivermectin (its elimination half-life is around a day) were somewhat disconnected from its pharmacodynamics (antiparasitic events persisting for several months after a single dose of the drug**) (11)."

I don't know how to interpet the units of Table 1 of that paper. So...

[https://www.drugs.com/pro/ivermectin-tablets.html](https://www.drugs.com/pro/ivermectin-tablets.html)

"...The plasma **half-life of ivermectin in man is approximately 18 hours** following oral administration."

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3043740/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3043740/)

"The **half-life of ivermectin in humans is 12–36 hours**, while metabolites may persist for up to three days."

So if we say 24 hours IVM half-life;
and the Zelenko immediate treatment recommendation for a 200 lb person would be 40.5 mg IVM per day;
and you're using 12 mg tablets, so let's say you take 3 tablets per day...
How many milligrams is being maintained in the blood during a week...

Day 1...
take 3 tablets = 36 mg

Day 2...
Day 1's dosage has become 18 mg
take 3 more tablets, new 36 mg
total = 54 mg

Day 3...
Day 1's = 9 mg
Day 2's = 18 mg
take 3 more
total = 63 mg

Day 4...
Day 1's = 4.5
Day 2's = 9
Day 3's = 18
take 3 more
total = 67.5 mg

Day 5...
2.25 + 4.5 + 9 + 18 + 36
total = 69.75 mg

Day 6...
add 1.125 to 69.75
total = 71 ish

I don't know if Zelenko's immediate treatment IVM dosages should be maintained longer than a week. But if they are then you'd be keeping about 70 mg IVM in the blood.

And so if you want to combine Zelenko's immediate treatment IVM dosage with the prophylaxis HCQ dosage (200 mg 1 time a day for 5 days, then 1 time a week), you'd have about 70 mg IVM and 900-1100 mg HCQ being maintained in the blood.

(HCQ 900-1100 mg: [https://raypeatforum.com/community/...-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303](https://raypeatforum.com/community/threads/transmissible-viral-vaccines-how-the-shots-are-affecting-those-who-havent-taken-it-they-may-be-designed-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303) )

And about this (that you posted, post # 5)...
"[https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/](https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/)

Hydroxychloroquine was given as 800 mg once,
followed by 600 mg in 6 to 8 hours,
then 600 mg daily for 4 additional days"

HCQ half-life is about 22 days, so those dosages will build up in the blood to be about 2000 mg that then slowly decreases (compared to Zelenko's prophylaxis HCQ dosages maintaining about 900-1100 mg).

### Dan2 — 2021-08-29T05:37:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/critically-thinking-with-doc-p-and-t-aug-19-eggsellent-info-at-minute-35.26366/post-303049>

And if you want to give ivermectin horse dewormer paste to your 200 lb miniature horse...

[https://raypeatforum.com/community/...powers-wont-allow-it.40014/page-2#post-669118](https://raypeatforum.com/community/threads/we-have-a-covid-lifeline-the-powers-wont-allow-it.40014/page-2#post-669118)

The ivermectin paste I bought doesn't have ingredients listed on the box or on the information insert, and I think it used to; I'm pretty sure when I bought it a couple months ago there were ingredients on the box. Now at the store, taped to the shelf, there's a notice from supposedly the horse dewormer manufacturer saying there's been talk on the internet about using it for humans but it's not for that and so don't do that. So I don't know if the CIA or CDC or whatever talked to the people who make ivermectin horse paste and told them to stop telling people the ingredients? And if they wrote that notice? I saw something online a few months ago, a screenshot from Twitter, I think, about the mRNA vaccine product info insert being blank. I don't know if that was disinfo but if not then maybe something's being put in the horse dewormer (a horse anti-psychotic?), or maybe it's a joke of making a paranoid person like me more paranoid about that.

> and then it stays at about that.
>
> So because of quinine's shorter half-life compared to HCQ (HCQ about 22 days, quinine about 10-18 hours), if you're using quinine sulfate instead of HCQ and you want to maintain about the same amount of quinine in the blood as is maintained by Zelenko's HCQ prophylaxis protocol, you'd want to dose about 500 mg every 12 hours instead of 200 mg.
>
> I don't see a recommendation from Zelenko about IVM dosage for prophylaxis, but if you want to mix the immediate treatment and prophylaxis protocol recommendations, then from the immediate treatment protocol: "Ivermectin 0.4-0.5 mg/kg/day for 5-7 days"
>
> And so for a 200 lb person...
> 200 lbs = 90 kg
> 90 kg x 0.45 mg = 40.5 mg IVM per day for 5-7 days
>
>
> And then what's IVM half-life, pharmacokinetics...
>
>
> [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2751445/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2751445/)
>
> "Absorption
> In healthy subjects that received **12 mg of ivermectin as oral solution, tablets or capsules, it was shown that the solution had approximately twice the systemic availability as either of the solid forms (tablets and capsules showed similar systemic availability**; Table 1). The oral solution was given as an ethanolic solution. This may affect bioavailability and could explain why the solution resulted in a twice as high availability as tablets and capsules. Nevertheless, **the rate of absorption was similar in the three cases** (11).
>
> ...
>
> **Data concerning excretion can be observed on Table 1**. No differences in the elimination half-life were detected among healthy and onchocerciasis subjects (12). It was also suggested that the **kinetics of ivermectin (its elimination half-life is around a day) were somewhat disconnected from its pharmacodynamics (antiparasitic events persisting for several months after a single dose of the drug**) (11)."
>
>
> I don't know how to interpet the units of Table 1 of that paper. So...
>
> [https://www.drugs.com/pro/ivermectin-tablets.html](https://www.drugs.com/pro/ivermectin-tablets.html)
>
> "...The plasma **half-life of ivermectin in man is approximately 18 hours** following oral administration."
>
> [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3043740/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3043740/)
>
> "The **half-life of ivermectin in humans is 12–36 hours**, while metabolites may persist for up to three days."
>
>
> So if we say 24 hours IVM half-life;
> and the Zelenko immediate treatment recommendation for a 200 lb person would be 40.5 mg IVM per day;
> and you're using 12 mg tablets, so let's say you take 3 tablets per day...
> How many milligrams is being maintained in the blood during a week...
>
> Day 1...
> take 3 tablets = 36 mg
>
> Day 2...
> Day 1's dosage has become 18 mg
> take 3 more tablets, new 36 mg
> total = 54 mg
>
> Day 3...
> Day 1's = 9 mg
> Day 2's = 18 mg
> take 3 more
> total = 63 mg
>
> Day 4...
> Day 1's = 4.5
> Day 2's = 9
> Day 3's = 18
> take 3 more
> total = 67.5 mg
>
> Day 5...
> 2.25 + 4.5 + 9 + 18 + 36
> total = 69.75 mg
>
> Day 6...
> add 1.125 to 69.75
> total = 71 ish
>
>
> I don't know if Zelenko's immediate treatment IVM dosages should be maintained longer than a week. But if they are then you'd be keeping about 70 mg IVM in the blood.
>
> And so if you want to combine Zelenko's immediate treatment IVM dosage with the prophylaxis HCQ dosage (200 mg 1 time a day for 5 days, then 1 time a week), you'd have about 70 mg IVM and 900-1100 mg HCQ being maintained in the blood.
>
> (HCQ 900-1100 mg: [https://raypeatforum.com/community/...-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303](https://raypeatforum.com/community/threads/transmissible-viral-vaccines-how-the-shots-are-affecting-those-who-havent-taken-it-they-may-be-designed-to-do-exactly-that.40134/page-24#post-669303) )
>
>
> And about this (that you posted, post # 5)...
> "[https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/](https://www.drugs.com/medical-answers/hydroxychloroquine-effective-covid-19-3536024/)
>
> Hydroxychloroquine was given as 800 mg once,
> followed by 600 mg in 6 to 8 hours,
> then 600 mg daily for 4 additional days"
>
> HCQ half-life is about 22 days, so those dosages will build up in the blood to be about 2000 mg that then slowly decreases (compared to Zelenko's prophylaxis HCQ dosages maintaining about 900-1100 mg).

Thanks, Dan2

I got this:
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...gsellent-info-at-minute-35.26366/#post-303036](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/critically-thinking-with-doc-p-and-t-aug-19-eggsellent-info-at-minute-35.26366/#post-303036)

\====================================================

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33278625/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33278625/[/COLOR])

The protocols have changed over time. Delta is much more infectious and aggressive. 12 mg daily for five days is NOT the recommendation any more. The best protocol I have seen is I-MASK+ at flccc dot net. Should be two or three times that dosage for as long as it takes, accompanied by a number of other supplements or drugs. Hard to OD on ivermectin, but taking too little isn't going to help.

The veterinary product must say only ivermectin and not include any other active ingredients like praziquantel. Still available for a reasonable price online at valleyvet dot com and chewy dot com. I would trust veterinary horse paste far sooner than Asian pills for humans (although I do have a stash of those too). Horses are expensive.

# Thread: Resources to protect son from WiFi at college dorm room
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/resources-to-protect-son-from-wifi-at-college-dorm-room.26372/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jacks — 2021-08-30T01:57:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/resources-to-protect-son-from-wifi-at-college-dorm-room.26372/post-303078>

Hi - my son just moved into college dorm and we were dismayed to discover the head of his bed is about 3 feet from a WiFi emitting device which is on the other side of the wall. It is a 50's era building ? First off he decided to move his head to the other end of his bed to increase distance from his head to the device. Just wanted some ideas on any additional tips of things to do to help. This is where we are at and some ideas:

1) we wrote to college maintenance folks to ask them to move the device to the bathroom area but Crickets so far
2) You can buy emf blankets - do these work and are they worth it as quite pricey?
3) He could hang such blanket in 2) on the wall behind his bed for protection
4) Cookie sheet against the wall near where the device is on other side of the wall.
5) Ask to move to another dorm.

Thanks

### Dan2 — 2021-08-30T04:51:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/resources-to-protect-son-from-wifi-at-college-dorm-room.26372/post-303083>

Ask these people for a specific recommendation depending on what frequencies the wifi device puts out (the mesh size affects what frequencies can get through it):

[htthttps://www.swiss-shield-partner.com](https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com/america/)

Or just cover the wall with solid copper foil because solid copper foil will guaranteed block wifi router signals (but might be more expensive than a shielding mesh):

[https://basiccopper.com/1milcopperfoil.html](https://basiccopper.com/1milcopperfoil.html)

To do it cheap, a couple layers of aluminum foil will also block wifi-range frequencies, but also might bring up associations for other students of tin foil hats and crack dens whereas copper foil could be pretty fancy lookin'. Or just use aluminum and cover it with a giant portrait of himself to let the other kids know who's boss.

And the foil will reflect a range of frequencies (not sure which) coming from the side of the wall he's on, so still not a good idea to sleep with his head right beside that. Maybe a specific mesh size would minimize the (common telecom device range) frequencies that reflect back on his side of the wall, by trapping the signals in the mesh and the metal in the mesh then gradually converts the signals to heat instead of the signals bouncing back out? (And then as long as the wifi router power isn't increased too much the wall probably won't catch on fire... probably. Just kidding, it wouldn't get that hot.) Ask [https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com](https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com)

More options than what Swiss Shield makes: [https://www.lessemf.com/fabric5.html](https://www.lessemf.com/fabric5.html)

### Jacks — 2021-08-30T19:23:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/resources-to-protect-son-from-wifi-at-college-dorm-room.26372/post-303105>

> [Dan2 said:](/goto/post?id=303083)
>
> Ask these people for a specific recommendation depending on what frequencies the wifi device puts out (the mesh size affects what frequencies can get through it):
>
> [htthttps://www.swiss-shield-partner.com](https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com/america/)
>
> Or just cover the wall with solid copper foil because solid copper foil will guaranteed block wifi router signals (but might be more expensive than a shielding mesh):
>
> [https://basiccopper.com/1milcopperfoil.html](https://basiccopper.com/1milcopperfoil.html)
>
> To do it cheap, a couple layers of aluminum foil will also block wifi-range frequencies, but also might bring up associations for other students of tin foil hats and crack dens whereas copper foil could be pretty fancy lookin'. Or just use aluminum and cover it with a giant portrait of himself to let the other kids know who's boss.
>
> And the foil will reflect a range of frequencies (not sure which) coming from the side of the wall he's on, so still not a good idea to sleep with his head right beside that. Maybe a specific mesh size would minimize the (common telecom device range) frequencies that reflect back on his side of the wall, by trapping the signals in the mesh and the metal in the mesh then gradually converts the signals to heat instead of the signals bouncing back out? (And then as long as the wifi router power isn't increased too much the wall probably won't catch on fire... probably. Just kidding, it wouldn't get that hot.) Ask [https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com](https://www.swiss-shield-partner.com)

**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### John Warner — 2021-08-31T02:59:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/keratoma-in-horses-foot.26375/post-303119>

Hello don’t know if this is the right place for this, or if anyone has any info on horses. Have a horse with a keratome in left front, wondering if anyone has used red light therapy. Thinking it would penetrate the hoof wall, and if anyone has tried this before?

### Martha Ray — 2021-12-05T23:42:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/keratoma-in-horses-foot.26375/post-307120>

I don't know if _red light therapy_ would help or not. Sorry no one noticed your question with a reply on that.
....I was looking for human foot health (zero drop grounding shoes) when I found your post.

Keep asking about the _red light therapy_....maybe _CT therapy_ too and you might also look into _magnetic therapy_.

I've had horses before and I know when someone uses the saying, '_**Healthy as a Horse**_' they don't know much about what can go wrong with them. Horse owners go to great lengths to keep them healthy, athletic and beautiful ...like humans they are complex and all the weight they carry only adds to the possibility of numerous muscular skeletal issues.

I do believe the Churchill saying,
**“There is something about the outside of a horse that is good for the inside of a man.”**

**_Hope you already found some help._**

# Thread: Sleeping in a tent
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-tent.26376/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### mdavid — 2021-08-31T18:15:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-tent.26376/post-303145>

Mind was wandering the other day, was thinking of purchasing a tent and sleeping in it one or two nights per week esp with fall coming and those crisp cool nights. The issues I have thought of are the chemicals in the tents, both plastics and fire retardants, as well as the possibility that the "floor" of the tent might prevent earthing at least to some degree. I am willing to try to sleep on the ground with no pad etc, just a sheet on the "floor" of the tent. I would prefer a completely enclosed tent with a floor as I don't necessarily want bugs from the ground crawling all over me or mosquitoes.

Before I spend time digging into this I figured I would post here and see if anyone has gone through this and come out with a good solution.

### Daulatwant — 2021-08-31T19:48:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-tent.26376/post-303152>

> [mdavid said:](/goto/post?id=303145)
>
> Mind was wandering the other day, was thinking of purchasing a tent and sleeping in it one or two nights per week esp with fall coming and those crisp cool nights. The issues I have thought of are the chemicals in the tents, both plastics and fire retardants, as well as the possibility that the "floor" of the tent might prevent earthing at least to some degree. I am willing to try to sleep on the ground with no pad etc, just a sheet on the "floor" of the tent. I would prefer a completely enclosed tent with a floor as I don't necessarily want bugs from the ground crawling all over me or mosquitoes.
>
> Before I spend time digging into this I figured I would post here and see if anyone has gone through this and come out with a good solution.

Here is a rough example of what I would like to try.
{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" } [](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/dugout-shelter-png.19240/)

Dig out a place, make raised edges and cover over the raised edges with a tarp. So no rain can get in and gets redirected somewhere else.

The deeper it is likely, the warmer it will be during cold months since deeper ground maintains ~54F year round.

It is important to pick an elevated area to make shelter to begin with so you keep away rain, dew and moisture.

Fog will flow down into lower areas and can make you wet even when there is no rain.

Vegetation transpires water and if you put your tent or other shelter on top of vegetation like grass it will create a wet warm area where bugs will gather.

### Dan2 — 2021-08-31T23:36:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-tent.26376/post-303159>

[https://www.youtube.com/results?search\_query=frame+wall+tent+off+grid](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=frame+wall+tent+off+grid)

### mdavid — 2021-09-02T17:49:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-tent.26376/post-303200>

Thank you both for your suggestions, I had not thought of a framed wall tent, I will check out some more of the videos, at least for now I would like to find something small for 1-2 people made of canvas with some ventilation netting, something I can easily assemble and disassemble in a few mins by myself.

My father lives out in the country so I will likely use the tent there, he will probably think I am nuts and wont want anything permanent on his property, my house is just outside of town but I am on a fairly main road with not too much property so I don't love the idea of. I also have a condo but they would likely frown upon a tent outside, however there is a sandy island that is a quick ride on the boat from there that I may also set the tent up on, I believe it is not allowed but if I get there late at night with a small tent and pack up early AM I can't see anyone hassling me.

### caroline — 2021-09-03T08:59:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-you-live-right-now-in-australia-you-must-devise-a-plan-to-leave.26379/post-303225>

very dark day indeed....

It makes us so sad/horrified to see how fast this is all happening.

We have loved living here in Australia. It has been everything we had hoped for and dreamed of.

Australia - the lucky country

That's the thing - when you are old ...where do you run too? We have both had a very full life. We have jumped lots of times without a parachute.

We have had a great life here and, of course, we are fighting back but it seems like a losing battle if the young people don't get out of their fog and wake up and see what is happening and stand up for their rights and their freedom.

I am sitting here on our verandah - overlooking oyster channel. I am surrounded by bush and water and ocean and I have tears running down my face.... This should have been the perfect place.

Good luck to all the young people here - you can embark on a great new adventure.

You can be whatever you want to be - as long as you have bitcoin in your wallet - the world is your oyster.

Lite up the world ....you have learned so much here - go forth and prosper.

Make everything that Jack has taught us count.

We will do what we can in our own small way but if the masses don't get involved.....

When we look back there was so many small things that got us here ...and most didn't see it coming - and still don't.

[@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) we didn't ever imagine living anywhere else either. We are 55 and 65 respectively and my husband has a massive health challenge going on in amongst all of this stupidity, we have had to navigate half a dozen hospital visits/admittances across 3 hospitals in Melbourne during last 12 months which has been nothing short of insane - you cannot imagine the stupidity these imbeciles have displayed. One of our last emergency room visits was with a cardiologists letter to admit Vince that saw us separated with me sitting in a hallway connecting hospital buildings becasue I refused to leave and with Vince in afib and unable to walk alone in the triage/waiting area for 6 hours - alone!!!

It was complete bedlam with my challenging the security guards about checking on him every hour and at one stage they came and followed me as I was speaking with someone from the cardiology department and tried to throw me out. I felt so sad for the elderly slumped in chairs and the migrants who couldn't speak English to stick up for themselves.

I really hope young people stand up and do something about this way of life they will be forced into, as for us there is no way we can live under these conditions in major cities and will search where we can be free to some degree to sit this insanity out and watch what unfolds because it is without a doubt going to get crazier, glad you're somewhere you can watch the world go by.

your story is heartbreaking Laudy. What a difference from 9 years ago when my first husband was very ill and in and out of hospitals for 3 years.
I never left his side and was always treated with kindness and consideration.
I slept in various chairs but also staff would put up a bed for me in his room - and even made the bed for me!
The staff and doctors were all extraordinary and always went the extra mile for both of us. I was always fully supported while they did their best to keep him alive even tho they knew it was a futile effort.

I can't believe things have changed so dramatically in such a short time.

I was feeling sorry for myself when I wrote the above post ....but today I am all fired up again.

Actually - I don't want to sit and watch the world go by! I want to be an active participant!

I don't know that we can leave this up to the young people - they seem to be completely brain washed and don't have a clue what is happening around them.

The defining moment for us is when our pregnant daughter in law got double jabbed. The stupidity of that overwhelms us. She is a very smart young woman and a doctor \[gastro specialist\]
and to go one more stupid step further ...they are going to induce labour early. She has had a great pregnancy with no issues but she is 35yo.

Maybe we have to take some responsibility ....we raised this generation.

Oh dear! So sorry that this has happened, yet I too have experienced very intelligent family members and 2 doctor friends who have happily and even EAGERLY accepted both jabs. I always considered these people to be much smarter than I was. and yet, here they are falling for the greatest deception on earth. It's hard to understand. I can only say that it is done via repetition over many many years of brainwashing. That's how our beliefs are formed and unless we really think about this, we simply go along with the programming.

I understand how you feel as I too am overwhelmed at the notion that these people have been tricked to such a profound extent.
The manipulative skill of these demonic psychopaths cannot be underestimated. The next few years are going to test all of us.

### John Schumacher — 2021-09-07T06:47:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-you-live-right-now-in-australia-you-must-devise-a-plan-to-leave.26379/post-303425>

The Nazis often portrayed those they persecuted as vermin, parasites, or diseases. Nazi ideology focused on the idea that Germany’s "racial purity" was under attack from the "blood of weaker peoples," and Nazi propaganda often depicted Jews, political opponents, and others as parasitic organisms that threatened the overall health of the so-called Volksgemeinschaft (German racial community). During the years of the Nazi regime, German doctors frequently argued that Jews spread disease. Reflecting common themes in Nazi propaganda, these medical professionals repeatedly pushed the false claim that Jews were especially responsible for outbreaks of typhus—a deadly contagious disease spread by lice.

The Nazi propaganda poster featured here was created in 1941 for public display in German-occupied Poland. The Polish-language words translate roughly to "Jews are lice; they cause typhus." Designed to link Jews and typhus closely together in the minds of non-Jewish Poles, the poster shows one of the feared typhus-ridden lice drawn on top of the face of a Jewish man that has been made to look like a skull. Several other examples of antisemitic Nazi propaganda depict Jews covered in lice, but this image seems designed to suggest that Jews and lice are fundamentally similar creatures equally responsible for spreading the disease.

German doctors and public health officials in the Nazi regime helped advance these antisemitic ideas. They did not acknowledge that the German invasion of Poland and the creation of Jewish ghettos were actually responsible for creating typhus epidemics in occupied Poland by imposing hunger, poverty, overcrowding, and unsanitary conditions. Instead, German medical professionals published essays claiming that Jewish people’s supposedly “low cultural level” and "uncleanliness" were to blame.

The respected status of German physicians helped spread the lie that Jews were responsible for spreading typhus. Concerned only with preserving the health of German personnel, German public health officials in occupied Poland repeatedly urged occupation authorities to isolate Jews further from the rest of the population. Their professional medical advice was used to rationalize the creation of Jewish ghettos throughout occupied Poland. German occupation authorities used propaganda posters like this one to spread these unfounded justifications for the isolation of Jews from Polish society.

Are the "Un-Vaxxed" the new "them"? -> [https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...ive-to-social-credit-score.26299/#post-302346](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/vaccine-passports-are-wef-initiative-to-social-credit-score.26299/#post-302346)

Caroline it does suck but we need to find a way to navigate this.

I was invited to join a fb group last night and thought I would just have a look - well!!!

My faith in people and in humanity has somewhat been restored, not everyone is brainwashed and I feel hope today.

I am attaching the link, its brilliant, its businesses all pushing back saying 'jabbed or unjabbed' you are welcome in our businesses - we wont discriminate.

Its only a small thing but its truly a start, when I joined last night the group had 5.2k members, tonight it has surpassed 57k members and most people are extremely supportive. Also different groups started on instagram.

So much gratitude in that group as they are giving us unvaccinated hope that there are decent people left out there and what the government is doing is so wrong on so many levels.

A lot of people now fedup, many who have lost everything or are on the verge of losing everything and finding ways around it.

Here are links to look and join if you want.

The fb group is australia wide.

Businesses ALL Welcome Jabbed or NOT Jabbed Australia Wide
[https://www.facebook.com/groups/1213829215752696](https://www.facebook.com/groups/1213829215752696)

These ig groups are in state groupings. This is the link to the NSW group.

Shop without your Shot
[https://www.instagram.com/shopwithoutyourshotnsw/](https://www.instagram.com/shopwithoutyourshotnsw/)

It will cheer you up ❤️

### Sue-UK — 2021-09-07T14:49:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-you-live-right-now-in-australia-you-must-devise-a-plan-to-leave.26379/post-303436>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=303429)
>
> Things will start to open up a little if you are vaccinated. On the services NSW app - your vaccine history will be recorded so when you check in to anywhere with your QR code - you will be denied entry if no jab.

There's probably more than one way round it in Aus, and I've done more research on the UK law, (and I'm ready ....) but I've seen the Aus 1988 privacy act section 94H quoted by twitter activists. 94H (2) appears to make what you describe illegal.

_" (2) A person commits an offence if the person:

(a) refuses to enter into, or continue, a contract or arrangement with another person (including a contract of employment); or

(b) takes adverse action (within the meaning of the Fair Work Act 2009) against another person; or

(c) refuses to allow another person to enter:

(i) premises that are otherwise accessible to the public; or

(ii) premises that the other person has a right to enter; or

(d) refuses to allow another person to participate in an activity; or

(e) refuses to receive goods or services from another person, or insists on providing less monetary consideration for the goods or services; or

(f) refuses to provide goods or services to another person, or insists on receiving more monetary consideration for the goods or services;

on the ground that, or on grounds that include the ground that, the other person:

(g) has not downloaded COVIDSafe to a communication device; or

(h) does not have COVIDSafe in operation on a communication device; or

(i) has not consented to uploading COVID app data from a communication device to the National COVIDSafe Data Store.

Penalty: Imprisonment for 5 years or 300 penalty units, or both."
_

edited to add this

I'm not wearing this on a lanyard, but to avoid confrontations that might get me arrested I'll have a few of these printed out in my bag.  Maybe someone in the twitter-sphere will have the Aus version.....?

### Crimson Funk — 2021-10-21T05:47:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-you-live-right-now-in-australia-you-must-devise-a-plan-to-leave.26379/post-305121>

In Western Australia, by the end of the year I must be vaccinated or I can't work in 75% of workforces. I believe that this constitutes coercion/force into medical experimentation. Does anyone know how I could try to hold my member of parliament accountable for a breach of the Nuremberg code?

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-10-25T13:47:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/if-you-live-right-now-in-australia-you-must-devise-a-plan-to-leave.26379/post-305316>

> [Crimson Funk said:](/goto/post?id=305121)
>
> In Western Australia, by the end of the year I must be vaccinated or I can't work in 75% of workforces. I believe that this constitutes coercion/force into medical experimentation. Does anyone know how I could try to hold my member of parliament accountable for a breach of the Nuremberg code?

Hi there [@Crimson Funk](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23742/) sorry I dont know the answer to your question. I am in Victoria with our own set of horrors going on.

They have thought this out really well and covered all bases from what I am hearing. My tradie son in the construction industry refused the jab and was stood down two weeks ago, no idea when this will end and many others I know now out of work waiting to see what happens.

Our amazing premier who has done such an outstanding job and should run for PM (sarcasm here, he should be awarded the title jerk of the century) has said that this is going to continue in 2022 and tonight has sprung a surprise vote in the lower house to give himself unprecedented powers by extending the SOE powers - its going to be a shit show in Victoria, many of us looking at where to go as a first step to get out of the oppression in Victoria so we can think and work out what our next move will be.

There are lawsuits and class actions going on everywhere, I heard there are about 200 listed to be heard but don't know if thats correct.

There are many sm groups that have popped up , its complete madness out there.

I know these lawyers are here in Melbourne but maybe start with them as they have a lot of info on their website and ask if they can direct you towards what you can do and networks in WA [https://www.facebook.com/hraaustralia](https://www.facebook.com/hraaustralia)

Reignite Democracy are another group who have some decent numbers, see if they can offer support [https://www.facebook.com/reignitedemocracyvic](https://www.facebook.com/reignitedemocracyvic)

There are many groups popping up on all sm channels you can search that are open to all, that are offering work to unvaccinated people (especially tradies), just get onto sm and start looking. Also many groups who are accepting everyone regardless of vax status.

Also speak with Craig Kelly of the United Australia Party, he and Clive Palmer (I know) are on our side so we need to listen to them and support them if their policies are freedom of choice, no vaccine mandates and no vaccine passports. They must be able to direct you on how to proceed or have contacts in WA.

[https://twitter.com/CraigKellyMP](https://twitter.com/CraigKellyMP)

[https://twitter.com/UnitedAusParty](https://twitter.com/UnitedAusParty)

Wishing you good luck and take care of yourself in the meantime,

Laudy
