# Thread: UV light, folate, and the pituitary
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/uv-light-folate-and-the-pituitary.26730/>
**Subforum:** Redox Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2021-12-20T23:16:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/uv-light-folate-and-the-pituitary.26730/post-307764>

UV light attenuates most of the effect of all pituitary and adrenal hormones but can positively modulate others like cortisol via its interaction with sun at a surface. This obviously is a big deal to those who have pituitary tumors. Light can change the properties of biomolecules and the number of drugs found to be photochemically unstable is steadily increasing daily in medicine. The effects of light on drugs include not only degradation reactions but also other processes, such as the formation of radicals, energy transfer, and luminescence. Adequate protection for most drug products during storage and distribution is needed. Indeed, proper storage conditions that secure protection from UV and visible radiation are essential for the efficacy of many common dermatologic drugs.

If a drug is exposed to fluorescent tubes and/or filtered daylight for several weeks or months before it is finally administered to the patient, the drug may be altered. The most common consequence of drug photodecomposition is loss of potency with concomitant loss of therapeutic activity. It is therefore of interest to be aware of light induced reaction in biomolecules. Do realize that UV radiation breaks down folate more in the skin than it does in the eye naturally?

Might this be a photochemical sensor between the two surfaces that act as an antenna for light stimulus to control skin growth? Folate is also a cofactor in the creation of dopamine from tyrosine using UV light in the RPE and skin. Could this photochemical linkage explain why there is a belief of an association between UV radiation and skin cancer? People focus in on MTHFR defects without ever considering other parts of the construction of our protein lattices. Did you know as dopamine drops in tissues we actually get more cancer risk?

Folate acts to quench the photochemical excitation in this process. The dance between your RPE, skin and Gut is the key in this process and at all levels involves light. You pay a biologic toll because of choice, or you gain a biologic benefit because of your choice. At the outset of this quantum situation (light), the dopamine levels are the same. After you decide and the results are in, you will see that the environment will add or subtract from your dopamine bank account. The result determines the reality you get because of the choices you made. In this way it should be clear how the environment dictates results in all of biology below our perception.........why? Your eye is built to see colors not the interaction of UV light on aromatic amino acids that make up dopamine.
[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22747844/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22747844/)

### caroline — 2021-12-21T03:42:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-talk-to-the-jabbed-people-in-our-life.26731/post-307771>

How do you explain, in simple terms, to the brain washed and jabbed people in our life ... why these covid injections are a complete world wide humanitarian medical disaster of epic proportions.

I want to get the science right but I want to be brief and to the point.

I get angry and emotional - which, of course, doesn't help.

I feel devastated that the doctor in our family is totally onboard with the clot shot, and they hold her up as the authority on this medical matter. After all - there is a doctor in our family and we should be listening to her and forget about this world wide conspiracy theory.

There is a world wide conspiracy alright .....not a theory.

I feel so angry and hurt that the folks in our lives try to insist that we should get the jab and that we are being selfish and ridiculous ...... but they have not done any due diligence what so ever.

When did our government become so trustworthy????

Apparently Aussies think that Dr. Norman Swan is the gold standard for medical/covid advise and every word he utters is gospel .....God help us all!

Trust me - I'm a doctor......

What do you say to the people in your life?

I don't think we can sway them in the least but, at least, we need to know what we are talking about in clear and concise terms.

We need to be able to verbalise the courage of our convictions in no uncertain terms

The rest is up to them.......

### Liam Taylor — 2021-12-21T12:54:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-talk-to-the-jabbed-people-in-our-life.26731/post-307773>

I've been telling people about my concerns around the globalist agenda for almost 10 years now. Not once have I received an apology for the fact I told them something which was publicly available information at the time, which they called conspiracy theory, and is now common knowledge which they accept. Nothing in my experience suggests we're able to convince other people through conversation. Unfortunately I suspect the only way is via subtle manipulation -planting seeds etc. etc. - which most ethical people object to doing and find rather exhausting to attempt.

Alan Watt of cutting through the matrix (died earlier this year, very suspicious), has been barking on about this for 20 years via his podcast. He advised about **all** of this. He didn't predict it, he simply reported what organisations like the council on foreign relations (hi ) had made publicly available.

I need to reply in the other thread, but I'm too damn depressed about all of this to do it right now.

I've decided its not up to me to justify my decision. My body, my choice. If I actually do a thought experiment to weigh up the probability that I'll change a particular family member' or friend's mind to the extent that they see my point of view or regret having had the shots (and now the first booster ) and that probability is pretty much zero, what is the point? Why leak energy to them?

I stop anyone trying to coerce me now, I see it as energy vampire behaviour, unintentional though it might be.

### Sue-UK — 2021-12-23T13:08:25+0200

Seeing the protests has kept a lot of people from going under I think, - including me - knowing we are not alone .... whilst waiting for enough mistakes to be made to trigger the tipping point ...

The saying "Never interrupt the enemy when he is making a mistake" comes to mind.

After a constant drip for months of one rule for them and one for us, attitudes are generally changing in the UK thanks to leaked photos of the garden parties in Downing Street last year when it was banned for us, and the admitting that the modelling predictions for infection rates and hospital admissions weren't done to inform decision making of new government policy, but done to fit whatever policy decision had already been made.

More stories hitting the MSM media, and more criticism. There's a definite change of mood. Normally if I go round a supermarket without a mask I get a fear vibe from some of the other shoppers, but yesterday ....none. Even though very few were not wearing masks, there isn't the hesitancy, no sense of disapproval. Been to the pub 4 times recently, everybody behaving normally, no masks, no social distancing. Conversation. Laughter.

At the last Parliament vote on minor restrictions, it went through with support from the opposition, it was nearly 100 of Boris Johnson's own MPs who voted against. Apart from risking the anger of his own MPs by bringing in more restrictions, (whilst giving the opposition a chance to get rid of him) he's now risking far more non compliance if he tries ....

The invisible is being made visible. By them.

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-22T20:16:53+0200

>
> Thanks. I do not understand many of your biological messages. They're flying over my head. Good for you. I'm miles behind you in biology knowledge. What have you done to get such a high and tidy level?

Thank you - [@Johan Lindstrøm](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22853/) - From your posts, I see you've been into this health thing for a while now as well. I love your workout room pictures!

I has never a smart kid like Dr. [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) - who has a photographic memory.

I was born with retardation. I failed kindergarten and first grade. The only reason I advanced through the grades was because I was a “good” kid, trying my best. Each year from grade school through junior high, I found myself a different school. My mother was an alcoholic and cycled through four husbands during her life. I was also physically uncoordinated; I could not through, hit nor catch a ball. I ran so slow the PE teacher asked if I was pulling an anchor. It felt like it. I was poor at everything academic – reading, writing, math and science. I entered remedial classes beginning at Junior Community College(s) since I scored below 3rd grade level for reading and writing. My academic goal was to be able to read and write at a college level. Using my health practices to assist in this effort, I completed College English, Calculus, some Physics; then overtime, since I could only afford a few classes per semester, I finally graduated with my BS in Computer Science thirteen years later.
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/granpa-johns-optimal-journal.23952/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/granpa-johns-optimal-journal.23952/)​

Since my grandparents _(for which we get our longevity genes mRNA from)_ had died in their thirties and early forties, my wife and I decided to live on less so I could retire, spend sometime together before I walk through the exist; _no one has made it out of here alive_. So, September 2020, I ending my second career which was in "Data Processing".

Now I'm pursuing the education for my third profession - that is to become a Health Practitioner. Of course, I don't have any of the pre-med courses. So, I've started a self study of chemistry and biology in Sept 2020. I found right away that it frustrated me greatly. It seemed "so wrong"; but I didn't know why. So I've been studying Plasma Physics, and Electrical Engineering to augment my studies in chemistry and biology. It has really helped. Now, I have a better idea why I was so frustrated with chemistry and biology - _how these were "half right"_.

From a biochemical perspective, we _(our current understanding of things)_ are like "Flat-Earth" thinkers still stuck in 100 year old mentality about Quantum Physics & Biology. It is my hope, we will be able to engage the mind of Dr. [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) to think beyond the current paradigm. He has done a great job so far!

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...is-it-wrapped-in-our-human-environment.25380/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/is-health-a-supplementation-of-multiple-interventions-or-is-it-wrapped-in-our-human-environment.25380/)
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...entality-about-quantum-physics-biology.26715/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/will-we-ever-develop-past-our-flat-earth-100-year-old-mentality-about-quantum-physics-biology.26715/)

We want to be able to describe things like: How do our hormones work? -> _from a light-water-magnetism perspective_

Now back to China & the Supply-Chain discussion,

I believe China is _playing_ us _(including the WEF's IMF)_ with the tactic called _"a cat's paw"._
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/307465](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/307465)
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/306026](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/306026)
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...riendship-come-here.25436/page-73#post-305960](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-btc-thread-when-you-need-some-answers-love-advice-or-friendship-come-here.25436/page-73#post-305960)
​

China knows this planned-demic will fizzle out soon. They have in place the next set of world crises, which are posed to leverage China's advancement.

Just think for a moment - What advantage does shutting down the Supply-Chain do to help enrage the Chinese populous political distrust in capitalism?

Perhaps to engage the nation against [an evil world empire](https://ucsdmodernchinesehistory.wordpress.com/2010/01/29/confucian-china-and-its-modern-fate/)?​

Are we so naive to impose our paradigm _(thinking)_ onto ancient Chinese culture & beliefs, where honor of [the emperor is sacred](http://afe.easia.columbia.edu/cosmos/prb/heavenly.htm).

For example: [https://theconversation.com/how-chi...h-capitalism-to-create-a-new-communism-167586](https://theconversation.com/how-china-combined-authoritarianism-with-capitalism-to-create-a-new-communism-167586)
After his complaining argument, the author writes, "I fear that, after my childhood in communist Poland, I may have to live out my old age under a communist 2.0 regime of [renewed oppression](https://www.theguardian.com/books/2018/apr/15/the-road-to-unfreedom-russia-europe-america-timothy-snyder-review-tim-adams)."​

This is not the Chinese perspective on rule & order -> for the [emperor](https://www.latimes.com/world-nation/story/2020-10-22/china-xi-jinping-mao-zedong-communist-party) has foreseen it.

[https://www.theguardian.com/comment...-jinping-china-beijing-new-age-of-imperialism](https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2021/dec/12/xi-jinping-china-beijing-new-age-of-imperialism)

An ancient Chinese understanding of the consequences of modernity is _Sui ji_. The “knowledge” that fate, fortune, chance and luck are powers given to the gods.

"Whoever does not understand ming cannot become a junzi. (Analects 20.3)... Deliberate conduct and good and bad deeds are matters of xing; prosperity and good and bad auspice are matters of ming."

There are three natures of ming.

1\. lu, good fortune
2\. zao yu, adverse encounters
3\. xing ou , chance and luck.
​

Contingency is knowing a future is not predictable as in quantum physics -> the uncertainty principle. This is an ancient Chinese term called: _Sui ji_, for random, stochastic.

During each rebirth incarnation, the gods endow a human with honor or disrespect.

"The way of the heart: Mencius’ understanding of justice" By Huaiyu Wang

[http://faculty.smcm.edu/jwschroeder/Web/ETHR1002/Global\_Jutice\_Readings\_files/11.wang.pdf](http://faculty.smcm.edu/jwschroeder/Web/ETHR1002/Global_Jutice_Readings_files/11.wang.pdf)​

When an emperor is empowered with wisdom, we _(Chinese mindset)_ do best to understand our place in the universe for when we show respect, the gods maybe pleased.​

So, what was the point of all that? Until we can put on the moccasins of our fellow human experience, it will be difficult to understand their perspective. And even when we try, our rose colored glasses will distort our view.

# Thread: Favourite Jack kruse blogs over the years...
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 10
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### caroline — 2021-12-24T01:39:45+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307859>

The December Pow Wow was a barn burner! Jack is no longer mincing words - He is saying what he needs to say, and what we need to hear, in very direct terms.

There are a lot of great blogs that we should be revisiting .......like having a good and well loved book in our library that we need to go back to and reference time and time again.

Jack has written so much to inform and educate us over the years......are we paying enough attention? I think Jack is wondering if we are paying attention at all.......

Jack, and other courageous Doctors are putting so much on the line for all of us. They risk losing everything.

What are we prepared to risk?

We have lost friends and family but found other like minded friends - but that pales in comparison to what Jack is doing daily to bring us all the current information that we need to be informed.

What are your favourite blogs? Which ones do you go back to time and time again?

How many times have you had a light bulb moment when re reading an old blog?

I have many favourites .....

The Brain gut series
C/T
Epi Paleo

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-12-24T03:10:27+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307869>

[@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) I have not really focused on the blogs or the website at all to be very honest in the 3 years I have been a member. I have focused on more of the social media posts being time poor in the past, which is not good enough, this is one of the things I have begun to change, I have been guilty of not reading the blogs.

If I am truly honest I have skimmed over them and put them in the too hard basket to come back to, however it is time to dive deep into them to understand properly.

I have about a dozen open now ready for reading in Jan, I will get back to you.

### caroline — 2021-12-24T03:46:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307870>

> [Laudy Cincotta said:](/goto/post?id=307869)
>
> [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) I have not really focused on the blogs or the website at all to be very honest in the 3 years I have been a member. I have focused on more of the social media posts being time poor in the past, which is not good enough, this is one of the things I have begun to change, I have been guilty of not reading the blogs.
>
> If I am truly honest I have skimmed over them and put them in the too hard basket to come back to, however it is time to dive deep into them to understand properly.
>
> I have about a dozen open now ready for reading in Jan, I will get back to you.

Some blogs are really, really hard!
lots of the earlier blogs have a non geek section .....which would be me!
But some have such great information and I can get thru them no problem ...like the brain gut series.
We will have lots of time in the coming year .....once we get out of OZ!

One important thing ......We need to read the comments on the blogs. Jack answers specific questions that members ask. There is gold in the comments.

Jack has given us so much of his time - the least we can and must do is to read them. Sometimes it takes a few reads to get it tho.

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-12-24T06:54:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307876>

[@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) you are correct and we should all be reminded how much effort goes into everything JK does to help people. So much gratitude for it all and the way to acknowledge his tireless work and appreciate his efforts are to read the blogs, understand them, learn from them, fix my health, share & educate others - thats my journey and I see as one of the reasons I am here now!

### caroline — 2021-12-24T23:27:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307904>

> [Laudy Cincotta said:](/goto/post?id=307876)
>
> [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) you are correct and we should all be reminded how much effort goes into everything JK does to help people. So much gratitude for it all and the way to acknowledge his tireless work and appreciate his efforts are to read the blogs, understand them, learn from them, fix my health, share & educate others - thats my journey and I see as one of the reasons I am here now!

for me personally \[non geek\] I read through blogs and try my best to understand the over all gist of the blog. I then read it again and again if it is heavily scientific/medical.

After awhile we get familiar with the terminology and it gets somewhat easier

I can see with Tony - when he reads some of the blogs - he just gets really frustrated and puts it all in the "too hard basket"

So - because he doesn't understand some things in the blog. - he throws the baby out with bath water - so to speak.

Personally, as long as I can get the overall intent of what Jack is trying to teach us the first time around ...I am pretty happy.

Understanding comes with multiple reads down the track - sometimes much further down the track - when we connect other dots.

It is all a process of learning and understanding as we negotiate our daily life.

We are all a work in progress ...baby steps!

Jack has set the bar very high ...but, as he has always said - He won't come down to our level - He will drag us up to his level.

This is an amazing experience and an optimal health trip of a lifetime. We are pretty darn lucky that Jack cares enough to keep doing this.

Let's not disappoint ourselves.....I love the daily learning and growing and interaction with like minded people, even though, lots of days, it really hurts my head!

I am in this for the long haul ....are you?

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-25T00:30:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307907>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=307904)
>
> Personally, as long as I can get the overall intent of what Jack is trying to teach us the first time around ...I am pretty happy.

That is pretty much me too, A lot of it is way over my head, but at least we (some family and friends) are following the basics while slowing picking up more and more info as we go.

### caroline — 2021-12-25T00:32:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307908>

> [Richard Watson said:](/goto/post?id=307907)

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-25T02:32:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307911>

Yep, I think back 5 years and boy have I modified my thinking and lifestyle a lot, thanks Jack and many others on here.

### caroline — 2021-12-25T03:41:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307914>

I forgot to mention all the great youtube stuff that Jack does.

Jack has mentioned that a lot of us do much better with the videos. Tony certainly does .
He loves Jack's direct and no nonsense approach and he is able to take it onboard faster and gets it ....which is the most important bit of course.

When he doesn't get a blog it makes him feel dumb ....and he is far from that.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seasons-greetings-from-oz.26739/post-307862>

Today is Christmas Eve in Australia.

Merry Christmas and thankyou to Dr. Kruse and everyone who participates here.

This is going to be a very interesting year for all of us.......

How will each of us move forward in 2022.....

Will we be proud and strong and unmanageable?

As Jack has said ....It will stop when we say it stops!

I want to make this coming year - 2022 - the year I put my big girl pants on and stand up against tyranny ...and say enough!

Have a wonderful Christmas season full of seafood of all kinds and some wonderful wine - with people in our life who get what we are all facing.

Stand strong, stand together, and be unmanageable!

**Posts:** 7

### Freebird — 2021-12-24T03:48:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307871>

They've been completely coating the skies daily.

You can detect where the sun is, but it ain't comin' through.

Is there any place where this is not happening, or at least not happening to this extent?

### caroline — 2021-12-24T03:55:01+0200

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307877>

Plenty of sunshine here over the week or so, did have a period of cloudy weather before that, but been enough to have a max tan atm.

### Josie Thomson — 2021-12-24T12:46:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307883>

>
> They've been completely coating the skies daily.
>
> You can detect where the sun is, but it ain't comin' through.
>
> Is there any place where this is not happening, or at least not happening to this extent?

Here in UK All the time over Exeter. Was early in am during autumn. Recently I thought maybe they'd gone on holiday! Atm doing it randomly..like mid afternoon to break up normal clouds. So yeah it's happening here. Control freaks make no mistake about it.

### DLO — 2021-12-24T18:16:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307894>

Panama is clear as @#$@#
Basically CANU is fucked
Canada Autralisa NZ USA

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-24T20:28:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307899>

Thinking about this topic more, I reckon its been 2-3 months since seeing a long lasting jet trail, though there was one a few evenings ago that produced a brief trail, and that was only when it was traveling through colder pockets of air. Its a winter thing here, depending on the weather sometimes we might see 10 or more per day.
Please dont think I dont believe there isn't some spraying dome somewhere round the world, yes most likely . But what I believe we see in this remote/ish part of the globe are vapor trails.

# Thread: ‘NZ Medical Council has blood on their hands’
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Richard Watson — 2021-12-24T06:33:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/post-307875>

[](https://waikanaewatch.files.wordpress.com/2021/11/blood-on-hands-graphic.jpg)

**Extract from a letter sent to the NZ Medical Council from a retired Doctor in Tauranga.**

“… the still birth rate has rocketed. Usually there are 114 still births per year for the entire country but in just two weeks Hastings alone had 9 still births in vaccinated mothers who were following your advice to get the vaccine. You are responsible for the death of those babies. You have blood on your hands. I suppose you are also in denial regarding the deaths of teenagers.

We have 2 siblings dead after the vaxathon in Christchurch – a girl aged 15 and a boy aged 17. Plus a 17 year old boy in Northland and a 13 year old in the South Island – both dead the day after their vaccination -and a 14 year old boy in South Auckland who died 2 hours after his vaccination. Also the 17 year old girl whose death should have stopped the roll out but was instead blamed, prior to any autopsy report, on the pill – which she had been prescribed some time prior so therefore the GP would have checked for clotting risk factors at that point in time.

I know a lot more about this case then you do as I know close family friends. I am also aware that the government has asked families involved with severe adverse reactions and deaths to sign waivers that come with financial settlements. This blatant attempt to further cover up vaccine failures is abhorrent, as is the gagging of the media at the cost of millions of dollars of tax payer money.

Why don’t you speak up against this propaganda ? Why do you sit quietly and do nothing while the government promotes a drug that should never have passed Medsafe? And to add insult to injury, in promoting the vaccine you have violated the Nuremberg Code in its entirety. You might like to look that up and familiarise yourself with your offences. You are all guilty of crimes against humanity. And if you think I am exaggerating, you are wrong.

I have all of your names and I have forwarded them – except for Dr Goodman, who I know is in her heart a very decent person – along with the names of Dr Bryan Betty and Dr Samantha Murton and the NZ board of the RANZCOG, to Dr Reiner Fuelmich. Dr Fuelmich is an international trial lawyer who has successfully sued large fraudulent corporations eg Volkswagen and Deutsche Bank. His worldwide network of lawyers has listened to over a hundred experts from every field of science and medicine relating to the current PCR / Covid fraud. In due course he intends to put a Nuremberg 2 trial through the International Criminal Court.

Finally, I do not wish to be associated with a scientifically ignorant organisation that has lost its ability to practice evidence based medicine, has banned open debate, censors its doctors, allows politicians to decide how best to treat patients, has abandoned the principal of informed consent and, worst of all, has broken its promise to first do no harm. I hold you in the utmost contempt as do many New Zealanders. I shall see you on the other side of history. My conscience will be clear but may God have mercy on you”.

Alanna Ratna, Retired GP, Tauranga

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-12-24T07:18:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/post-307879>

Wow! What a brilliant letter and what a brave doctor, there should be so many more applauded for their courage, thanks for sharing Richard.

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-24T16:31:01+0200

> **Extract from a letter sent to the NZ Medical Council from a retired Doctor in Tauranga.**
>
> “… the still birth rate has rocketed. Usually there are 114 still births per year for the entire country but in just two weeks Hastings alone had 9 still births in vaccinated mothers who were following your advice to get the vaccine. You are responsible for the death of those babies. You have blood on your hands. I suppose you are also in denial regarding the deaths of teenagers.
>
> We have 2 siblings dead after the vaxathon in Christchurch – a girl aged 15 and a boy aged 17. Plus a 17 year old boy in Northland and a 13 year old in the South Island – both dead the day after their vaccination -and a 14 year old boy in South Auckland who died 2 hours after his vaccination. Also the 17 year old girl whose death should have stopped the roll out but was instead blamed, prior to any autopsy report, on the pill – which she had been prescribed some time prior so therefore the GP would have checked for clotting risk factors at that point in time.
>
> I know a lot more about this case then you do as I know close family friends. I am also aware that the government has asked families involved with severe adverse reactions and deaths to sign waivers that come with financial settlements. This blatant attempt to further cover up vaccine failures is abhorrent, as is the gagging of the media at the cost of millions of dollars of tax payer money.
>
> Why don’t you speak up against this propaganda ? Why do you sit quietly and do nothing while the government promotes a drug that should never have passed Medsafe? And to add insult to injury, in promoting the vaccine you have violated the Nuremberg Code in its entirety. You might like to look that up and familiarise yourself with your offences. You are all guilty of crimes against humanity. And if you think I am exaggerating, you are wrong.
>
> I have all of your names and I have forwarded them – except for Dr Goodman, who I know is in her heart a very decent person – along with the names of Dr Bryan Betty and Dr Samantha Murton and the NZ board of the RANZCOG, to Dr Reiner Fuelmich. Dr Fuelmich is an international trial lawyer who has successfully sued large fraudulent corporations eg Volkswagen and Deutsche Bank. His worldwide network of lawyers has listened to over a hundred experts from every field of science and medicine relating to the current PCR / Covid fraud. In due course he intends to put a Nuremberg 2 trial through the International Criminal Court.
>
> Finally, I do not wish to be associated with a scientifically ignorant organisation that has lost its ability to practice evidence based medicine, has banned open debate, censors its doctors, allows politicians to decide how best to treat patients, has abandoned the principal of informed consent and, worst of all, has broken its promise to first do no harm. I hold you in the utmost contempt as do many New Zealanders. I shall see you on the other side of history. My conscience will be clear but may God have mercy on you”.
>
> Alanna Ratna, Retired GP, Tauranga

Thank you for sharing this extract.

They have not used the feet to walk away from their convictions, but have used their feet to stand for what is right! _<- Thank you for the example._

_Let us each use our feet to stand upright._

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-25T02:39:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307912>

But there is an atmosphere, its just devoid of oxygen, its still able to fly in a atmosphere of carbon dioxide, molecular nitrogen and argon.

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-25T03:12:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307913>

> [Richard Watson said:](/goto/post?id=307912)
>
> But there is an atmosphere, its just devoid of oxygen, its still able to fly in a atmosphere of carbon dioxide, molecular nitrogen and argon.

And since the Mars atmosphere is much thinner (less dense) than ours, the helicopter on Mars has to work much "harder" to get lift.

### DLO — 2021-12-25T22:48:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307927>

For the longest time i remember them saying that mars can't sustain life because it lost it's atmosphere

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-27T22:07:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307972>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=307927)
>
> For the longest time i remember them saying that mars can't sustain life because it lost it's atmosphere

Mars atmosphere is: **95% by volume of carbon dioxide (CO2), 2.6% molecular nitrogen (N2), 1.9% argon (Ar), 0.16% molecular oxygen (O2), and 0.06% carbon monoxide (CO).**

**[https://www.nasa.gov/feature/goddar...-curiosity-serves-scientists-a-new-one-oxygen](https://www.nasa.gov/feature/goddard/2019/with-mars-methane-mystery-unsolved-curiosity-serves-scientists-a-new-one-oxygen)**

# Thread: Be careful with Sinclair and Huberman.  Their "science" is marketing.
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/be-careful-with-sinclair-and-huberman-their-science-is-marketing.26747/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2021-12-28T18:46:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/be-careful-with-sinclair-and-huberman-their-science-is-marketing.26747/post-308005>

At 1:01:39 in the full video he talks about high dose NR depleting phosphate and potentially creating problems, then talks about NR vs NMN head to head.
What you should know: Despite being called on this bullshit marketing by NIH earlier this month, Sinclair tells another audience that SIRTs are longevity genes & that resveratrol activates them. At same conference, he was told that NMN is frequently contaminated by LPS yet he tells people buying his products around these supplements they can take it safely. This is a public health hazard.

Why is Sinclar FOS?
The video is filled with astounding level of bullshit and/or ignorance. Anyone with a biology degree should know that NR is NOT made from NAM. There's no example in all of biology in which a nucleoside is made from a base. NR is made from degraded NAD coenzymes (cytochrome 1) just as adenosine is made from ATP. It is stupendously ignorant that he said that NR would deplete phosphate!!! The other possibility is that he knows the difference and is spreading misinformation to make money and banking on you or other supposed scientists like Huberman not knowing the basics.

Are there other concerns? Yes.
If you listen to the comments carefully on what he says are ongoing clinical trials you'll pick up another key feature of wy you cannot trust his version of science which is really slick marketing. The comments tell us he knows about the trial results but that should be impossible if the trials were blinded as he says they were. This implies he ought not in the future to claim that his trials are blinded. if they were blinded, he can't know results. if he commented, on the trials they were not blinded by definition

Is there more BS to sift through?
Yes indeed. He further made it impossible for his lab to publish serious work on NR v NMN by saying that one does not reproduce the other. Imagine being the student that can't reproduce NMN, gets a positive NR result or finds they both work! He is not a scientists. He is utterly & completely unethical

Nucleotides don’t go into cells & nucleosides are not made from bases. Sinclair is hugely influential source of misinformation via his marketing arms. There is no debate in biology on how nucleotides are made yet here is a Harvard professor saying things that undergrad biochemistry students can show are false.

If you want to save a shit ton of money on Sinclair's crap marketing and science:
just begin by buying and taking combined metabolic activators (CMAs)—a combination of L-serine, nicotinamide riboside, , N-acetyl-L-cysteine, and L-carnitine tartrate, to reduce symptoms of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease and improve leptin resistance at the liver level.

Imagine being the student that can't reproduce NMN, gets a positive NR result or finds they both work! He is not a scientists. He is utterly & completely unethical
>
>
> Nucleotides don’t go into cells & nucleosides are not made from bases. Sinclair is hugely influential source of misinformation via his marketing arms. There is no debate in biology on how nucleotides are made yet here is a Harvard professor saying things that undergrad biochemistry students can show are false.
>
> If you want to save a shit ton of money on Sinclair's crap marketing and science:
> just begin by buying and taking combined metabolic activators (CMAs)—a combination of L-serine, nicotinamide riboside, , N-acetyl-L-cysteine, and L-carnitine tartrate, to reduce symptoms of non-alcoholic fatty liver disease and improve leptin resistance at the liver level.
>

Thank you Dr. [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) for the post

What is interesting to me is the belief of these "researchers" that they could supplement enough to compensate for an apparent NR deficiency or malfunction.

Articles like "Nicotinamide Riboside—The Current State of Research and Therapeutic Uses" [Nutrients.](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7352172/#) 2020 Jun; 12(6): 1616.

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7352172/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7352172/)
"Nicotinamide riboside (NR) has recently become one of the most studied nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+) precursors, due to its numerous potential health benefits mediated via elevated NAD+ content in the body."

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

_Thus_

Claiming: "NAD+ in all these processes suggests a significant potential for the treatment of various pathophysiological conditions with supplementation"​

Oh by the way -> _Conflicts of Interest_

The authors declare the following competing financial interest(s): M.M and U.S. are employees of the Biosynth Carbosynth group, a corporation that sells various nicotinamide riboside derivatives. U.S. acknowledges that he has intellectual property related to methods to produce NR salts and possible uses thereof. Royalties on sales of NR are expected to accrue to U.S. as inventor.​

_Can you just imagine the dosage requirements for NAD+ _supplementation,_ since it is necessary along so many steps of the mitochondria ATP respiration cycle?_

I do realize that most people are so "mitochondrially" sick that any help along the respiration pathway would at least give the patient as sense of _"feeling better"..._
Perhaps, a drip IV 1 gram NAD+ three times daily for a month? _...but then what?_

I'm persuaded that supplementation of a different kind may show efficacy.

Riboflavin with Photodynamic Therapy
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/how-does-one-overcome-covid.26729/#post-307752](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/how-does-one-overcome-covid.26729/#post-307752)
​

Whenever "researchers" study mitochondrial respiration they neglect this organelle's primary mover - _light._

[https://www.wjgnet.com/1948-0210/full/v12/i7/562.htm](https://www.wjgnet.com/1948-0210/full/v12/i7/562.htm)​

NAD(P)H was oxidized under normoxia by (most likely), the main ROS generated in photochemical processes, rather than by products (radicals, radical ions) of the photochemically activated process or any photochemical activation of TMRM itself in a type-1 photoreaction.

[https://www.jbc.org/article/S0021-9258(19)30926-3/fulltext](https://www.jbc.org/article/S0021-9258\(19\)30926-3/fulltext)​

Mitochondria are known as the sensitive repository for ROS production. It is noted that mitochondria are polarized as the negative electric potential differences between outer and inner membranes with the lipid bilayer structure. Nano-PSs with positive charge may have a high tendency to localize in the mitochondria by potential-driven translocation upon their entry into the cells.

[https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/2515-7639/abc9ce](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/2515-7639/abc9ce)

​

There seems to be synergistic interplay between enhanced metabolism and mitochondrial ATP upregulation by R-NIR light; LLLT shows an enormous potential for the success of cell-based therapies, for instance, for end-stage liver diseases, in particular in view of the good water permeability of liver mitochondria.

[https://atm.amegroups.com/article/view/23854/html](https://atm.amegroups.com/article/view/23854/html)
​

### healthy2015 — 2022-01-01T19:58:18+0200

### John Schumacher — 2022-01-01T21:35:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/foie-gras.26751/post-308203>

I buy duck, cook at low heat with herbs, de-bone it, put meat in a container & fat into another, both go into refrigerator, then the bones & cartilage are submerged into water and cooked at low heat with herbs & a tablespoon of vinegar for hours; when "done", I pour broth into a container and placed into the refrigerator. I typically, break up the meat into serving sized containers, covering the meat in broth and freeze. The rest of the broth I used in cooking vegetables; when just before serving, I melt some duck fat into the vegetables. _It's important to not "over-cook" your fats._

# Thread: ALL THINGS LINKING COVID TO IL, CA, AND NY.............
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-things-linking-covid-to-il-ca-and-ny.26752/>
**Subforum:** The Kruse Longevity Center
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jack Kruse — 2021-12-30T21:08:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/all-things-linking-covid-to-il-ca-and-ny.26752/post-308095>

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

they said they would never do this. but, of course, they did.

but even on top of this nasty oppressive campaign of “jim covid” (which looks, based on demographic patterns for vaccination more and more like actual jim crow) another jarring issue arises:

_**it’s been pretty wild watching the exact same people who have spent a decade declaiming any and all attempts to require ID to vote in america as racist attempts at voter suppression to disenfranchise minorities who lack ID or are uncomfortable providing it (a near 100% baseless claim) flip to demanding not just proof of vaccination (which minorities disproportionately lack) but ALSO these same ID’s that are apparently too difficult to obtain for voting.**_

i mean, how is anyone supposed to take that dichotomy seriously?

**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### caroline — 2021-12-31T07:10:20+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/happy-new-years-from-oz.26753/post-308125>

**“It’s never too late to become who you want to be. I hope you live a life that you’re proud of, and if you find that you’re not, I hope you have the strength to start over.”**
_\- F. Scott Fitzgerald

This will be a big year for us .....full of uncertainty and a little fear of the unknown, but we are pretty proud of ourselves for having a go.

The important thing is to keep pushing forward, keep looking forward and be all in 150%

What will 2022 hold for all of us? Will we become who we want to be?

I want to be more, give more, get more of all those intangible things on this remarkable journey that make us feel truly alive and glow with vitality and joy.

I wish all of us, especially Dr. K., peace and joy and deep love and a desire to be more.....

Let's never stop pushing forward and learning and loving and living a remarkable life.

All of us here at jackkruse.com know better .....so we must do better.

We are so excited for this coming year.....

Happy New Years everyone!_

### Racheal — 2021-12-31T14:10:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/racheal-from-georgia.26754/post-308127>

Hi! I’m Racheal. I’m 25. I live near the GA mountains at the 34th latitude. aiming to move to rural florida (or another state with a lower latitude) by Feb 2023. I sunrise sungaze at 0 - 5 degrees as my morning ritual. i spend my free time naked in nearby waterfalls or my backyard. i LOVE rain and fire. i’m primarily pescatarian.

My haplotype is U2. My mother’s family lives in Aruba (12th latitude!) and i try to visit often (although covid = a hindrance)

I’ve been a follower of Dr. Kruse for almost 2 years now. I’m on an optimal journey and it has been a struggle due to my career... which i am hoping to change once i recover from some severe setbacks induced by my own stupidity... for work I’m a chemical process engineer. which sadly means i’m exposed to non native EMFs regularly. Once i recover from my aforementioned setbacks, i’m hoping to pursue a new career (in the physics / research realm) where i either work in a laboratory or work outside. My minor is in nuclear engineering/atomic physics so i hope to find some work in the quantum field maybe one day... but to meet my goal of moving by 2023 i am looking for energy-related research/engineering work in the meantime. something to be more helpful to the earth than harmful like i am in my current role.

any way... hello all  i’m looking to connect and meet new people who have the same desires to live optimally bc i have been pretty damn lonely doing this alone. message me if you wanna talk

### John Schumacher — 2022-01-01T19:14:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/racheal-from-georgia.26754/post-308194>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=308177)
>
> Waterfalls are highly valuable.
> They must be worth good few degrees of latitude.
>
> There was a time when [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) was recommending indoor waterfalls
> ...

Cool moving water specifically in a waterfall has an abundance of highly negatively charged hydrogen molecules.

The **hydrogen anion**, H−, is a [negative](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Electric_charge) [ion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ion) of hydrogen, that is, a [hydrogen atom](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hydrogen_atom) that has captured an extra electron. these ions are called **[hydrides](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hydride)**. The ion has [two electrons](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Two-electron_atom) bound by the [electromagnetic force](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Electromagnetic_force) to a nucleus containing one proton.

Over 400 enzyme-catalyzed Hydride transfers (H−T) reactions depend on the cofactor nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (phosphate), NAD(P)H, which acts as a source of two electrons and one proton (equivalent to a hydride ion).

What is interesting to me is in human biological reactions - hydride transfer is a _light-dependent_ mechanism.

[https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/anie.201712729](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/anie.201712729)
The light-dependent NADPH protochlorophyllide oxidoreductase (POR) catalyzes the reduction of the C17−C18 double bond in ring D of protochlorophyllide (PChlide, P) to produce chlorophyllide (Chlide, C).
The enzyme requires the coenzyme NADPH while the substrate PChlide acts as a photoreceptor (Figure above).
The double bond reduction was shown to proceed in a sequential manner, on a μs timescale, where first Hydride transfers (H-T) from the _pro-S_ face of NADPH to the C17 position of PChlide occurs followed by a PT to C18, most likely from a conserved Tyr residue within the POR active site.​

What is also interesting to me is _magnesium hydrate_ is a core element.

Light-driven protochlorophyllide reduction catalyzed by the enzyme protochlorophyllide oxidoreductase, using NADPH as a coenzyme.
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...de-a-better-transport-for-gas-exchange.25305/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/does-hydrated-magnesium-six-h2o-shell-cage-provide-a-better-transport-for-gas-exchange.25305/)
​

_Your skin is a beautiful respecter._

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/all-things-sun-redox.24408/#post-297273](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/all-things-sun-redox.24408/#post-297273)​

NYE PSA as the sun sets in 2021: As the magnetic field power decreases on Earth, the revolution of Earth slows due to energy loss. As the Earth's rotation slows, earthquakes frequency uptick geologically. The slowing of the rotation of the planet is a function of the wireless interaction of light between the sun and our magnetic core. As magnetic field power decreases methylation patterns on DNA change. The more methylation marketing we have the harder it is to live a long life. We experience biological time loss. In this way, a loss of magnetic flux on Earth mimics what inflation does to money. It is a cause of time theft. When magnetism on Earth decreases, volcanoes change too by becoming more active.

### Jack Kruse — 2022-01-03T17:11:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-holocaust-and-covid-birds-of-a-feather.26757/post-308277>

I think the argument I've heard is "the Nazis didn't start with the holocaust". It's all a matter of framing. Meaning Nazis didn't start doing evil, they built up to it and tore down Germany's democracy before people realized what was happening. The idea is that America might end the same way.

First, German "democracy" was in ruins before the Nazis ever took over. It was an experiment put into place after WW1 and doubted by many Germans from the start, who preferred the authoritarianism they had grown up with from the constitutional monarchy they had under Wilhelm.. The Great Depression was its final coffin nail.

By the early 30s, a majority of Germany's legislators (and people) were openly opposed to democracy. The last few prime ministers (chancellors) ruled using emergency powers. German democracy was already fatally wounded and bleeding out when Hitler was made chancellor in 1933.

Second, the Nazis were already clearly Nazi. Political violence was their method. Well before coming to power, Nazi stormtroopers (Sturmabteilung) regularly beat up their enemies, often killing them. It is impossible to overstate how common political violence was in Germany.

There was also nothing secret about Nazi beliefs. Hitler had screamed them out in speech after speech. His horrid opus "Mein Kampf" (My struggle) was published in 1925 and clearly laid out Hitler's hatred of the Jews and his dreams of expanding Germany's borders. Neville Chamberlin never paid attention to these signs. Churchhill did.

When the Nazis took actual power, their elimination of democracy was rapid. Hitler was made chancellor in January 1933. New elections took place in March and in the same month, the Reichstag voted Hitler dictatorial powers (444-94). By July Germany was a one-party state.

The Nazis set up their first concentration camp, Dachau, in March 1933, actually one day before Hitler became dictator. It was mainly for political prisoners but Jews were immediately targeted with violence and occasionally murder. The Nazis didn't become evil gradually.

Yes, the Holocaust came later, but the brutality of the Nazis was clear and most Germans accepted Hitler or were proud of him. The cheering crowds are seen in the 1934 propaganda film "Triumph of the Will" were not faked. In less than 2 years, Germany had become totalitarian.

I fear a COVID police-state or Biden medical fascism state now exists in America. I think under Biden we are in a similar place right now as pre-Nazi Germany. America under Biden has lost its strong democratic traditions embraced by most of its people and leaders. Bad things continue to happen with medical tyranny in 2022 with mandates and I think he has to be stopped at the ballot box come November 2022. If not I think we will continue to follow the 1933-1934 Nazi game plan under his administration.

### Jack Kruse — 2022-01-01T22:54:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/malones-interview.26761/post-308207>

[https://jrelibrary.com/1757-dr-robert-malone/](https://jrelibrary.com/1757-dr-robert-malone/)

Over the years he says he’s coordinated trials that have received billions in Government funding. Claims he has worked with and knows many people at the CDC, knew Anthony Fauci well, and has many friends in the US intelligence community.

Rogan brings up the Twitter ban. Malone says he’s probably the only person with his background without a conflict of interest - says he earns no money from this (unlike others).

Malone also mentions his deplatforming from LinkedIn for pointing out that the head of Reuters is also on the board of Pfizer. According to Malone LinkedIn subsequently reinstated him and formally apologized for the ban.

He surmises why exactly he was banned from Twitter - COVID Care Alliance video re COVID vaccines and/or a post about the World Economic Forum and their media management. Not completely understood or known at this time which was the offending tweet.

Malone discusses getting COVID in February 2020 and describes his “lungs burning”. Says he took femotidine. Describes a trial he has helped design using femotidine and celecoxib to treat SARS-CoV-2. Further says FDA would not allow an ivermectin arm in the study despite data.

Rogan wants to know why there is obstruction of these drugs (hydroxychloroquine & ivermectin). Malone describes the involvement of Rick Bright and Janet Woodcock in preventing the use of these drugs in the treatment of COVID. He won’t speculate on the why but says they’re wrong.

Malone says it is bizarre that Merck would come out against ivermectin. He says billions of doses of both hydroxychloroquine and ivermectin have been safely administered as well as both being on the WHO’s essential drugs list.

Malone says he got the Chinese protocols in February 2020 and these included hydroxychloroquine. Says he gave this information to the US Government. Rogan mentions the apparent success of ivermectin and asks what happened in Uttar Pradesh; high use of ivermectin & low deaths.

Malone says he had ‘Long COVID’ and then also took the Moderna vaccine because at the time it was thought that it may help with this issue. Claims he had some adverse reactions to the vaccine but despite these was ultimately fine.
Long COVID and post VAXXED adverse events are equivalent. Seems to be linked to insulin resistance and have high HbA1c = inflammatory state in the circulatory system.

Discussion briefly turns to natural immunity. Rogan mentions studies showing better effect of natural immunity versus these vaccines. Malone agrees.

Malone discusses the Trusted News Initiative led by the BBC and their charge against misinformation/disinformation and the use of the term anti-vaxxer to suppress anything against approved sources (Fauci, Tedros).

Discussion turns to cancel culture in the medical field. Previous example with Fauci vs. Duesberg and now leaked emails between Fauci/Collins aiming to ridicule Great Barrington Declaration founders.

Malone talks about Israel with high Pfizer vaccine uptake (up to dose 4) and surrounding Palestinian territories with relatively low uptake without this discrepancy being reflected in death numbers. Says all cause mortality is the most reliable variable.

Malone says VAERS is unreliable but “it’s the best we got”. Says there are issues both ways - death post vaccine not necessarily vaccine caused, vaccine correlated. However we’ve had the system for decades so we can look at trends and use aggregate value with large sample size.

Rogan asks about the financial incentive related to COVID deaths in hospitals. Malone admits he doesn’t know the exact numbers but says around $3000 given to hospitals if someone is diagnosed with COVID, further payments for ventilation and death due to COVID.

They discuss the possibility that someone with a gunshot wound or trauma who happens to test positive for COVID and then dies may be labeled as a COVID death.

Malone says the FDA has not done their job. Mentions data manipulation and the case of Maddie de Garay which was allegedly reported as gastric distress by Pfizer in their trial, when it is claimed she had a seizure and is now wheelchair bound.

Malone says their are all kinds of ways to craft clinical trials and study reports to hide the bad stuff and highlight the good stuff. Says what gets reported is often biased by expected outcomes and tricks of data. Financial incentives to make bad stuff go away.

Malone says Thompson-Reuters is the fact checker of choice of Twitter and they are in turn tied to Pfizer. This in part decides what is allowed to be discussed on Twitter.

They discuss the attacks on physicians. Highlight cases of Peter McCullough and Kirk Milhoan. Malone talks about the attack against him to have his license removed based on tweets and The Atlantic article written about him. Claims he “killed millions”.

Rogan brings them back to the statistics around vaccine related myocarditis. Malone says data shows incidence of up to 1 in 2700 of myocarditis in boys post vaccination. Claims that this myocarditis is different but he says no data. Also other adverse effects e.g. dysmenorrhea.

Malone discusses concerns around fertility post vaccination because of what he says are lipids (lipid nano particles) with the potential to affect the ovaries. Also talks about the spike protein and it’s ability to cause blood clots regardless of whether from virus or vaccine.

Extensive discussion about effects on ACEII receptors and disruption of the blood brain barrier by the spike protein. Rogan asks if the spike from the vaccine is different to the spike from the virus. Malone says yes but we don’t know if the difference actually matters.

Malone says it’s the job of the drug companies to prove that their spike i.e. vaccine created spike is not toxic. Rogan asks why so many people take the vaccine and have no adverse effects at all. Malone explains it with a response curve due to phenotypic/genetic differences.

### Jack Kruse — 2022-01-01T23:00:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/malones-interview.26761/post-308208>

He goes on to mention evidence that people who are diabetic or have high blood sugar levels seem to be more greatly affected by these spike side effects. This may be part of the explanation for many people being able to shrug off spike adverse effects, but not others.

Malone talks about T cells. Says we don’t really know for sure what these vaccines are doing to our T cells. Mentions cancer risks but cautions against lack of data. Also discusses some evidence for increased risk of illness post-vaccination for a period of time.

Rogan asks about the vaccine efficacy window. Malone says it seems to be ever-shrinking and goes on to mention that in some studies (cites Denmark study) there is a negative efficacy (higher risk of being infected) shown with increasing doses. Says this is specific to Omicron.

Malone says we’re administering a mismatched vaccine and driving the B and T memory cells towards a virus that no longer exists. Says his hypothesis for the poor viability of the vaccines on this basis is called “original antigenic sin”.

Malone talks about high pathogenicity and low pathogenicity H1N1 to describe in part the differences between other COVID variants and Omicron. Further discusses the very high R number (number of people infected by one person with a pathogen) of Omicron.

“Our government is out of control on this” says Malone. “They are lawless, they completely disregard bioethics” and “these mandates of an experimental vaccine are explicitly illegal, they are explicitly inconsistent with the Nuremberg Code”.

Rogan brings them back to Omicron. Malone talks about the alarmist models of Imperial College which he says the press just ran with. They talk about US hospital cases and the likely remaining predominance of Delta in those instances.

Malone says there is a perverse incentive to amplify the fear porn to maintain the state of emergency. Withholding of monoclonal antibodies and early treatment is described as “inexplicable”. “Is it incompetence or is it malevolence?”.

Malone raises the lack of reporting on the effectiveness of lockdown strategies as well as gain of function research and says “we’re in an environment in which truth and consequences are fungible”. Rogan says he feels compelled to have people on because of the censorship.

Malone says “Pfizer is one of the most criminal pharmaceutical organizations in the world based on their past history and fines”. He says it’s a cost benefit analysis in the pharmaceutical industry about misbehavior and that they are not grounded in ethical principles.

Rogan and Malone discuss the “mass formation psychosis” taking place globally. Quite a soft wind down to the end of the show but essentially a call for less tribalism, more openness to discussion, and an end to censorship.

A warning from both about the potential for an implementation of a social credit scoring system as an end point for all of this. Malone re-emphasizes the effect of what we’ve done to children including he says drops in IQ from masks and desocialization.

Rogan asks why the vaccine is dangerous to children. Malone says androgens have a role to play re effect in males. Also says that he’s not convinced that there is a discrepancy between kids and adults - cites potential reporting bias.

Coupled complex PBM and probiotic interventions can control the microbiome, improve the activity of the immune system, and save the lives of people with immune imbalances.

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8124384/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8124384/)​

PBM can influence the diversity of the intestinal microbiota, and can increase the percentage of _Allobaculum_, a bacterium in the category of the good ones in the intestine.

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/30074108/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/30074108/)​

_Photobiomics_

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31596658/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31596658/)

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

The main interactions between the microbiome and the body with a healthy and unhealthy microbiome. Bacteria in the microbiota produce SCFA, influence redox signaling, influence tryptophan metabolism, activate plant polyphenols, and produce neurotransmitters, hormones, and peptides. This has the effect of promoting a thick mucus layer, an intact epithelium, and producing numerous downstream metabolomic effects. The microbiome communicates with the body through these metabolites as well as direct communication through the vagus nerve. In dysbiosis, reduced SCFA levels weaken epithelial integrity, increasing efflux of bacterial metabolites, such as proteins and LPS, contributing to an increased inflammatory response and ‘‘leaky gut.’’ Production of TMOA and p-cresyl sulfate are correlated with cardiovascular disease. 5-HT, serotonin; ACh, acetyl choline; BBB, blood brain barrier; CVD, cardiovascular disease; DA, dopamine; GPCR, G protein couple receptor; IPA, indolepropionic acid; LPS, lipopolysaccharide; ROS, reactive oxygen species; SCFAs, short chain fatty acids; T2D, type II diabetes; TMA, trimethylamine; TMOA, trimethylamine oxide.​

# Thread: Call for WiFi Router EMF Risk Fact Sheet
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/call-for-wifi-router-emf-risk-fact-sheet.26765/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### MichaelC — 2022-01-04T18:57:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/call-for-wifi-router-emf-risk-fact-sheet.26765/post-308322>

I'm just gonna throw this out there: I think it would be VERY helpful to have an easy way to communicate both the risks, as well as how to mitigate those risks, of home wifi routers, for anyone still living in urban or suburban environments and in proximity to the stray wifi of other homes or apartments. I am thinking of a simple, one-page hand out that you can easily give out to neighbors, such as the format of those that appear on the Environmental Health Trust resource page: [https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/](https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/)

I actually reached out to EHTrust some time ago to suggest that they add such a fact sheet to their resources but they didn't respond and never did.

I envision something that keeps to one page, and ..

\- States the main health risks of excessive wifi exposure
\- Explains by analogy that you would feel bad to aggravate your neighbors by blasting your stereo at full volume 24/7, so you shouldn't blast your WiFi which is just a different portion of the EMF spectrum.
\- Tells the basic steps to reduce the router's footprint, while not losing functionality - .e.g. how to look up your router's admin login URL, access the settings and lower the output so it doesn't extend for hundreds of feet beyond your home where it isn't needed, and/or disable one band of your dual band, etc.

If anyone else would find this useful and has any further suggestions as to the content or for how to get it from idea to execution (a ready to go printable PDF), please feel free to jump in.

If someone in the community here has the organizational and graphic design skills (which I'm hoping) and were interested and wanted to earn some money as a creative gig, I'd be more than willing to throw a bit of money at this to get it done. If it's something others will find benefit in and end up using also, and would like to contribute as well that would of course be welcomed too.

I know we should all be able to live on acres of land where this isn't a concern, but in the meantime while working to make that a reality it would be a good intermediate step to help mitigate the damage of being in a less rural environment.

### John Schumacher — 2022-01-04T19:20:07+0200

> \- Tells the basic steps to reduce the router's footprint, while not losing functionality - .e.g. how to look up your router's admin login URL, access the settings and lower the output so it doesn't extend for hundreds of feet beyond your home where it isn't needed, and/or disable one band of your dual band, etc.
>
> If anyone else would find this useful and has any further suggestions as to the content or for how to get it from idea to execution (a ready to go printable PDF), please feel free to jump in.

If it's something others will find benefit in and end up using also, and would like to contribute as well that would of course be welcomed too.

Teslaphoresis of Carbon Nanotubes

[https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313)​

Teslaphoresis - The directed motion and self-assembly of matter at a distance using the near-field energy of the Tesla coil is a phenomenon we term Teslaphoresis.
We elected to use single-walled carbon nanotubes (CNTs) for this initial study because of their high polarizability, anisotropy, and the relative ease of studying the electrokinetic behavior of both bulk powders and individualized nanotubes in suspension.
When a small mass of CNT powder is placed within the near-field of the Tesla coil, explosive self-assembly and growth of an individual CNT wire occurs within a few seconds.
If, instead, the CNTs are dispersed in solution, numerous nanotube wires begin to self-assemble rapidly and to combine into one or more larger parallel arrays.
Furthermore, while Teslaphoresis has the distinct advantage of unrestricted directed self-assembly, we also found that the near-field energy of the Tesla coil wirelessly powers and self-assembles nanotube circuits and remotely self-assembles parallel arrays of individual nanotubes from the bottom-up.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

We have found that the physical limitations of conventional dielectrophoresis could be overcome by utilizing the near-field (≪ λ) radiofrequency (RF) energy transmitted by a Tesla coil.

TEP directed self-assembly of bulk CNTs into long macroscale wires. (a) TEP system with a Teflon dish containing ∼1 mg of CNT powder in a pool of 1% Pluronic water. The magnified region shows time-lapsed images of nanotube powder self-assembling and rapidly growing bidirectionally (<5 s) into a 10 cm long wire under a 30 W TEP field. Scale bars = 2 cm.

The 15 cm long nanotube wire rapidly self-assembled (∼40 s) 30 cm away from the antenna under a 100 W TEP field.

The toroid was capped with a 7.5 in. diameter aluminum disk to fabricate the 2 MHz Tesla coil’s antenna.
​

[https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl\_file/nn6b02313\_si\_001.pdf](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl_file/nn6b02313_si_001.pdf)

​

_Self assembly uaing LED light stimuli_ - [https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl\_file/nn6b02313\_si\_005.mpg](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl_file/nn6b02313_si_005.mpg)

Note:

The distance using in their experients. -> _30 cm_ just around a foot - 12 inches
The minimum power for a standard FM broadcast station which a construction permit applicant may request is _100 watts_ (0.100 kilowatts).​

We know the "warnings" of - 5G Wireless Communication and Health Effects—A Pragmatic Review Based on Available Studies Regarding 6 to 100 GHz

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6765906/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6765906/)
Frequencies in the millimeter waves (MMW) range are used in applications such as radar, and for some medical uses.

The effects of MMW on the immune system of mice or rats, finding activation of the immune system at both the cellular and molecular levels (41.95 or 42.2 GHz, 19.5 μW/cm2, 0, 1, 31.5 mW/cm2, 20 min or intermittently over 3 days)

MMW modulates the effects of the cancer drug cyclophosamide. In particular, the T-cell system of the immune system was activated and various other immune system relevant parameters affected. <- _Question: Isn't an over reactive immune system an effect of the COVID virus?_

Pulsed MMWs were used (6–100 GHz, 100 mW/cm2, 200–10,000 ms pulse length) and the skin temperatures were modeled as the function of both pulse length and frequency. Peak skin temperature increased as a function of frequency up to 20 GHz, while above 20 GHz it proved to be dependent on “absorption hotspots”. In deeper regions (>2 mm), the temperature increases were very low and highest around 10 GHz.​

Sources:

[https://www.fcc.gov/media/radio/low-power-radio-general-information](https://www.fcc.gov/media/radio/low-power-radio-general-information)

[https://www.fcc.gov/sites/default/f...s\_-\_guidelines\_for\_cellular\_antenna\_sites.pdf](https://www.fcc.gov/sites/default/files/human_exposure_to_radio_frequency_fields_-_guidelines_for_cellular_antenna_sites.pdf)

[https://www.mintz.com/insights-center/viewpoints/2776/2021-09-01-whats-new-5g-september-2021](https://www.mintz.com/insights-center/viewpoints/2776/2021-09-01-whats-new-5g-september-2021)

The next-generation of wireless technologies – known as 5G – is here. Not only is it expected to offer network speeds that are up to 100 times faster than 4G LTE and reduce latency to nearly zero, it will allow networks to handle 100 times the number of connected devices, revolutionizing business and consumer connectivity and enabling the “Internet of Things.”​

Ok so what?

COVID "vaccine" after-market data is showing (at least) some of the batches were more toxic than others, as reported in VAERS. These batches perhaps many more contained this nano-carbon material.
Teslaphoresis techonology is included in many of the CDC COVID submitted US Patents.

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-maskarade-continues.25360/page-49#post-305469](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-maskarade-continues.25360/page-49#post-305469)​

We know our wireless communication networks are ready.
We know Teslaphoresis assembles by the stimulus of light.​

_The question maybe: What benefit would this technology provide medically?_

I wish I could believe it was design for human benefit...
